programme.title: Top Action Ep.2
programme.desc: Nous vous recommandons les meilleures séries d'action et films dans une édition spéciale.

programme.title: Mourir ou Survivre pour Wildcat
programme.desc: Une journaliste capturée au Moyen-Orient lutte contre son passé tout en cherchant à renverser ses ravisseurs.

programme.title: Last Survivors
programme.desc: Un père et son fils, rencontrent un étranger qui menace de détruire l'utopie qu'ils ont construite.

programme.title: BMW X4
programme.desc: La X4 de BMW est censée être une version plus sportive de la X3. Nous la mettons à l’épreuve au BMW performance center aux États-Unis.

programme.title: Arabella Classics
programme.desc: Des raretés automobiles dans un paysage de rêve. L'Arabella Classics, l'un des rallyes de voitures classiques les plus exclusifs d'Europe.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Les véhicules modernes tels que la BMW X6 M, la Mercedes-AMG E 63, le Grand Cherokee SRT de Chrysler et l'Audi S6 reposent toujours sur le concept classique du moteur V8. Nous avons jeté un coup d'œil à ces exemples de puissance V8 moderne.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Nous avons jeté un coup d'œil par-dessus la Manche à des créations passionnantes comme les Bentley Flying Spur et Mulsanne, les Aston Martin Vanquish, One-77, V12 Zagato et Rapide S et les Rolls Royce Wraith, Phantom et Ghost.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: Lykan HyperSport - La fabrication d'une supercar
programme.desc: Ralph R. Debbas avait le rêve de construire la super voiture ultime et la première développée dans le monde arabe. Il a réuni un financier de Beyrouth, des ingénieurs et des designers de Turin et des spécialistes des moteurs d'Allemagne pour créer la Lykan HyperSport. Supercars suit la fabrication d'une super voiture, des premières expériences de conception à son dévoilement au salon de l'automobile de Doha.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: La BMW M6 Gran Coupé est le dernier SUV de Munich qui combine le meilleur du luxe, de la puissance, du design et du confort.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: Voitures de sport a toit ouvert
programme.desc: Le roadster Wiesmann MF5, l'Audi R8 V10 Spyder et le Ruf RT 35 sont de vrais compagnons bavarois mais plus rapides que toutes les saucisses et bières.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: Les jouets a un million de dollars du Moyen-Orient
programme.desc: Elles sont élégantes, exclusives et surtout extrêmement rapides : les supercars ! Découvrez la première supercar arabe et de nombreuses autres voitures de sport de luxe flambant neuves du Qatar Motor Show.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: L’équipe de cascadeurs prévoit de mettre en place un affrontement entre l’homme et la machine. Pour une bande démo de leur travail l’un des cascadeurs d’Action Concept fera face à une nouvelle BMW série 3 dans une poursuite pleine d’action dans le site industriel qu’ils ont choisi comme scène principale pour leurs cascades.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Il fait chaud dans cet épisode de Stunt Heroes ! Le cascadeur Paul va être englouti par les flammes tandis que tout explose autour de lui dans cette dangereuse mais excitante cascade de feu. L’équipe d’Action Concept prépare avec attention cette scène d’action brûlante.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: C’est l’heure pour des combats et des boules de feux sur le terrain de jeu de nos cascadeurs. L’équipe d’Action Concept filme une scène de combat qui implique des vitres en sucre et un bus Volkswagen qui vole dans les airs.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Les cascadeurs ont un nouveau cannon dans leur arsenal qui leur permet de faire passer une voiture de 0 à 70 km/h en uen seconde. L’équipe avait un outil de ce type auparavant, mais le nouveau ne fait pas de fumée. Désormais, les réalisateurs n’ont pas à retirer la fumée digitalement lorsque la scène est finie. L’équipe essaie l'engin après avoir tourné une scène de poursuite sur une autoroute.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: Alerte dans le bac a gravier
programme.desc: Les cascadeurs ont transformé une carrière de gravier en leur laboratoire à cascade. Ils y répètent leurs cascades pour leur employeur principal, la célèbre série allemande "Police de l'Autoroute". Cette fois, une moto sans conducteur vole au-dessus d’une rampe, ils testent une catapulte pour humain et un nouveau coup est essayé dans une scène de combat. La cascadeuse Tina montre ses talents.

programme.title: Le flair suédois et l'ambiance conviviale de la Volvo S90
programme.desc: La Volvo S90. Une suédoise qui respire le calme et la puissance. Avec ses 4 mètres 96, elle est le plus long cuirassé Volvo jamais construit et entre ainsi dans la bataille des berlines de taille moyenne.

programme.title: Melkus RS 1000
programme.desc: Lorsqu'il est question de voitures de la RDA, on pense d'abord aux marques Trabant et Wartburg. Mais peu connaissent la Melkus RS 1000, la seule voiture de sport construite en série en RDA.

programme.title: Quand les Allemands s'accordent avec une Britannique : la Jaguar Arden AJ23
programme.desc: L'entreprise de tuning Arden de Krefeld est spécialisée dans les marques britanniques Mini, Bentley, Range Rover et Jaguar. L'AJ23 est une Jaguar F-Type R modifiée qui est déjà un modèle de série.

programme.title: Motorvision Specials
programme.desc: Le circuit Yas Marina d'Abu Dhabi est le circuit le plus glamour de la Formule 1. Khaled Qubaysi nous emmène dans cette visite exclusive des coulisses du célèbre circuit.

programme.title: Motorvision Specials
programme.desc: Stéphane Peterhansel est le pilote le plus titré de l'histoire du Rallye Dakar. Avec l'équipe allemande X-Raid, il a remporté les éditions 2012 et 2013 de cette prestigieuse compétition au volant d'une Mini Countryman.

programme.title: Motorvision Specials
programme.desc: Depuis plus d'un siècle, l'homme et la machine tentent de dompter la montagne Pikes Peak, où les casse-cou risquent tout pour être le plus rapide au sommet. Nous vous montrons les moments forts de la course de 2018.

programme.title: Motorvision Specials
programme.sub-title: Action sur la glace en Finlande
programme.desc: L'ancien champion du monde des rallyes Armin Schwarz est une légende derrière le volant. Nous l'avons suivi lors de son stage de pilotage au volant d'une Subaru WRX STI dans les paysages enneigés et glacés à couper le souffle de la Finlande.

programme.title: Motorvision Specials
programme.desc: La Tourist Trophy sur l'Île de Man est la course de moto la plus célèbre du monde. Klaus Klaffenböck, champion de side-car TT, et Lenz Leberkern, expert en courses, explorent la fascination qui se cache derrière cet événement emblématique.

programme.title: Mercedes-Benz S500 Plugin Hybrid
programme.desc: La S 500 a été la première voiture hybride rechargeable de Mercedes-Benz. Différents modes de conduite permettent à ce modèle de la Classe S d'être conduit la plupart du temps de manière purement électrique, du moins en ville.

programme.title: BMW R nineT Scrambler
programme.desc: On les appelle "Scramblers" et ils ont été abandonnés à une époque : des motos de routes partiellement transformées pour du tout-terrain tranquille. Aujourd’hui, la nouvelle BMW NineT Scrambler arrive sur le marché.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: La Course de côte de Pikes Peak 1987. Une course très différente des autres dans les montagnes du Colorado aux États-Unis. Unique, fascinante et pleine d’aventure.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: Depuis 1934, les Grand Prix sont le Championnat du monde le plus excitant et le plus fascinant sur le globe. Avec ses véhicules ultramodernes et très puissants des plus grandes marques, il ne manque jamais d’impressionner ses spectateurs.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: Rallye annee 1972 – Le succes de Ford
programme.desc: Le championnat international des constructeurs était une série de rallyes qui eu lieu entre 1970 et 1972. Des constructeurs automobiles tels que Porsche, Renault et Ford y ont participé, ce dernier ayant vécu une année remplie de succès en 1972.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: Le Championnat Allemand de Tourisme de 1992 (DTM) : surement l’une des séries les plus importantes au sein du sport automobile allemand. Dur, sans merci et bien connu pour ses luttes acharnées et sa compétition impitoyable.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: Des températures tropicales, une poussière permanente et de nombreux virages de bout en bout - voilà quelques-unes des nombreuses difficultés pour l’homme et sa machine durant le grand prix d’Argentine de 1964. Cette course est celle qui a mené la marque Mercedes au sommet.

programme.title: Mercedes 300 SL légère
programme.desc: Nous avons eu la chance de tester l'une des 29 Mercedes 300 SL "papillon" construites lors de sa première course au Mille Miglia.

programme.title: La dernière de son espèce : Lamborghini Jalpa avec V8 à moteur central
programme.desc: Sant' Agata Bolognese en Italie. Le temps semble s'être arrêté ici de manière agréable. Tout le monde connaît tout le monde. Et tout le monde connaît Lamborghini. La Jalpa est la dernière de son espèce, la dernière Lamborghini avec un moteur V8.

programme.title: Motorstories
programme.sub-title: La Mercedes 280 SE decouvre l’Amerique - New York
programme.desc: L’entrepreneur allemand Tilmann Miritz réalise son rêve dans la ville qui ne dort jamais : un road trip avec sa propre voiture vers les icones automobiles de sa jeunesse. Avec sa Mercedes 280 SE 3.5 décapotable, qu'il a importée de France, il rencontre le légendaire vendeur de voitures de collection Eliot Cuker à New York, qui a fait fortune avec sa passion pour les vieilles voitures.

programme.title: Motorstories
programme.sub-title: La Mercedes 280 SE decouvre l’Amerique - Long Island
programme.desc: Le voyage de Tillmann Miritz pour trouver les raretés automobiles aux États-Unis nous fait voyager du Pont de Manhattan à Long Island. En plein été indien, sa Mercedes décapotable l’amène jusqu’au vignoble Wölfer Estate, où le viticulteur allemand Roman Roth confectionne certains des meilleurs vins. Dans son garage se trouve une voiture de rêve : "Farmers Dream", un pick-up historique.

programme.title: Motorstories
programme.sub-title: La Mercedes 280 SE decouvre l’Amerique – Dreamcars italiennes
programme.desc: Si les voitures de sport italiennes sont considérées comme les joyaux de leur catégorie, ce n’est pas sans raison. Tout le monde connaît Ferrari, Maserati, Lamborghini et Alfa Romeo, mais qu’en est-il de Iso Rivolta ? La marque a disparu, mais la légende est toujours bien vivante parmi les fans. Plusieurs voitures de cette marque se trouvent dans un musée privé en Floride.

programme.title: L’histoire des motos BMW
programme.desc: De traditionaliste à avant-gardiste : le long voyage de BMW depuis 1923. Désormais la firme de Munich vise une toute nouvelle clientèle.

programme.title: Avec la McLaren 570 GT à Tenerife
programme.desc: La 570 GT est censée être la première McLaren qui soit non seulement sportive, mais surtout adaptée aux longues distances. Nous testons si cet exercice d'équilibre est réussi.

programme.title: Motorvision Specials
programme.desc: Le circuit Yas Marina d'Abu Dhabi est le circuit le plus glamour de la Formule 1. Khaled Qubaysi nous emmène dans cette visite exclusive des coulisses du célèbre circuit.

programme.title: Motorvision Specials
programme.desc: Stéphane Peterhansel est le pilote le plus titré de l'histoire du Rallye Dakar. Avec l'équipe allemande X-Raid, il a remporté les éditions 2012 et 2013 de cette prestigieuse compétition au volant d'une Mini Countryman.

programme.title: Motorvision Specials
programme.desc: Depuis plus d'un siècle, l'homme et la machine tentent de dompter la montagne Pikes Peak, où les casse-cou risquent tout pour être le plus rapide au sommet. Nous vous montrons les moments forts de la course de 2018.

programme.title: Motorvision Specials
programme.sub-title: Action sur la glace en Finlande
programme.desc: L'ancien champion du monde des rallyes Armin Schwarz est une légende derrière le volant. Nous l'avons suivi lors de son stage de pilotage au volant d'une Subaru WRX STI dans les paysages enneigés et glacés à couper le souffle de la Finlande.

programme.title: Motorvision Specials
programme.desc: La Tourist Trophy sur l'Île de Man est la course de moto la plus célèbre du monde. Klaus Klaffenböck, champion de side-car TT, et Lenz Leberkern, expert en courses, explorent la fascination qui se cache derrière cet événement emblématique.

programme.title: Mercedes-Benz S500 Plugin Hybrid
programme.desc: La S 500 a été la première voiture hybride rechargeable de Mercedes-Benz. Différents modes de conduite permettent à ce modèle de la Classe S d'être conduit la plupart du temps de manière purement électrique, du moins en ville.

programme.title: BMW R nineT Scrambler
programme.desc: On les appelle "Scramblers" et ils ont été abandonnés à une époque : des motos de routes partiellement transformées pour du tout-terrain tranquille. Aujourd’hui, la nouvelle BMW NineT Scrambler arrive sur le marché.

programme.title: Motorstories
programme.sub-title: La Mercedes 280 SE decouvre l’Amerique - New York
programme.desc: L’entrepreneur allemand Tilmann Miritz réalise son rêve dans la ville qui ne dort jamais : un road trip avec sa propre voiture vers les icones automobiles de sa jeunesse. Avec sa Mercedes 280 SE 3.5 décapotable, qu'il a importée de France, il rencontre le légendaire vendeur de voitures de collection Eliot Cuker à New York, qui a fait fortune avec sa passion pour les vieilles voitures.

Dans son garage se trouve une voiture de rêve : "Farmers Dream", un pick-up historique.

programme.title: Motorstories

programme.desc: Si les voitures de sport italiennes sont considérées comme les joyaux de leur catégorie, ce n’est pas sans raison. Plusieurs voitures de cette marque se trouvent dans un musée privé en Floride.

programme.title: L’histoire des motos BMW
programme.desc: De traditionaliste à avant-gardiste : le long voyage de BMW depuis 1923. Désormais la firme de Munich vise une toute nouvelle clientèle.

programme.title: Avec la McLaren 570 GT à Tenerife
programme.desc: La 570 GT est censée être la première McLaren qui soit non seulement sportive, mais surtout adaptée aux longues distances. Nous testons si cet exercice d'équilibre est réussi.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: L’histoire d’Olaf Manthey, un pilote de légende ayant gagné les 24 heures du Nürburgring 4 fois d’affilée. Découvrez le secret de son succès.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: Christian Menzel a demandé à notre présentatrice Miriam de participer à un entraînement de sécurité pour pilotes, pour lui donner quelques conseils et trucs à faire en cas de situation d’urgence.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: Le printemps a enfin fait fondre la neige sur le circuit du Nürburgring, et les pilotes peuvent enfin y retourner. De l’essence dans les veines, ces pilotes ont à nouveau pu faire des tours de piste.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: Le Nürburgring a tremblé lorsque la deuxième étape du VLN a débuté. Nous vous faisons découvrir à nouveau cette compétition palpitante, ainsi que les meilleurs moments de la victoire de BMW lors de la première manche.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: La quatrième course de la saison du VLN est souvent considérée comme un entraînement pour les 24h du Nürburgring. Pour les meilleures écuries, c’est la dernière occasion pour un entraînement approfondi.

programme.title: Glemseck 101
programme.desc: Une fois par an, les amateurs de café racers, de motos anciennes et de nostalgie se réunissent à Glemseck 101 à Leonberg, en Allemagne - le plus grand événement d'Europe pour les passionnés de moto et les motards.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers learn the hard way that even a taser can’t take some suspects down. Patrol cars roll up on a couple in a darkened pickup truck. Cops arrest one of the most polite suspects in America.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An assailant attacks a woman after bumping into her. A woman is arrested for spilling beer on a cameraman’s equipment. Two intoxicated women are placed under arrest after a physical altercation.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police follow a car after it leaves a drug house. A police officer in Las Vegas goes undercover posing as a ‘john.’ Officers give chase when they observe a car making an illegal U-Turn.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers respond to a traffic dispute involving an assault with a tire iron. Police are led to a battered woman after she dials 911. Officers on patrol encounter a couple engaged in prostitution.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers engage in a bizarre slow-speed chase after a suspect’s failure to stop. A woman is pulled over after leaving a known drug house. An Officer pursues two illegal drag racers on a public highway.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An officer attempts to pull over a man on a bicycle who refuses to stop. An officer arrests two suspects involved in a drug deal who attempt to discard the evidence. An officer questions a driver leaving a known drug area.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers hold a man under a car at gunpoint after a traffic stop. Officers are flagged down and directed to a couple arguing on the street. A man apologizes to detectives for the illicit items they find.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An undercover police officer sets up a sting to buy drugs. Officers find a surprise in a suspect’s trunk. A man claims that a prostitute has kidnapped him.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers break up a fight between a couple in the middle of the street. Not even a church is immune to being robbed. A dispute between neighbors involves deadly weapons.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A DUI suspect reminds an officer of one famous dude. A naked man shocks a stranger on her porch. A daughter’s tantrum shakes the whole apartment when mom takes away Facebook.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers investigate a fiasco at a fast food restaurant. A routine pullover results in a drug possession arrest. A vehicular pursuit results in an ill fated foot chase, the suspect is taken to jail for an outstanding warrant.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers get a tip and locate the suspect in a recent shooting. A woman is questioned when she is found parked alone in her car behind closed businesses. Officers respond to a call involving juveniles spray painting an electrical box.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers are called to fight between a mother and her son. Officers respond to a man on a trolley hurling racial slurs at a passenger. A traffic stop uncovers narcotics in a young man’s trunk.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers pursue two juveniles involved in a carjacking. Two men sitting in a truck are spotted hiding something in the console. A man claims he took drug paraphernalia from kids as a good samaritan.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A traffic stop over a broken brake light turns into a foot chase. A man handles bad news by throwing his furniture out of the window. A vehicle pursuit ends with a K-9 unit’s help.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An Officer’s patrol of an area known for drug activity turns into a foot chase that ends with the suspect running into a tree. An altercation following a minor car accident is resolved after the men apologize for their parts in the confrontation. Two suspects are arrested during an undercover sting designed to capture online child predators.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A disastrous carjacking results in an arrest. Officers respond to a domestic abuse call involving two women. Officers find drug paraphernalia on a suspicious man parked in the middle of the street.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers search for suspects stealing rims at a car dealership. A married couple claim drugs found in their car were from a nearby ditch. Officers detain an inebriated man arguing with a store clerk.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers in Boston bust a drug dealer in the midst of a transaction. Two adult men are questioned and later arrested for throwing bottles out of a moving vehicle. Officers set up a suspect who’s a known online predator in a sting operation.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police investigate a possible abduction at a trailer park. A man in a stolen truck is pulled over and Officers discover washed checks and drug paraphernalia. A suspect is arrested after abandoning a stolen vehicle behind a fast food restaurant.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect bails out of his vehicle when a car chase reaches a dead-end. An officer responds to a domestic disturbance call and recommends that the quarreling couple get a divorce. Officers investigate a suspected drug transaction.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers are forced to taze a suicidal man for his own good. A familiar face makes cops chase him through a grass field. No lie is too big for a suspect who seeks refuge in a condemned house.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A family with kids is taken on a high speed car chase. A intoxicated suspect tries to jump a fence while protesting that he’s not trying to run away. A jealous boyfriend terrorizes his girlfriend and her parents.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers are called to remove a man sleeping in a parking spot at Wal-Mart. A free-spirited couple takes their relationship to their front lawn. A resident brings a knife to a meeting with his building property manager.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies detain a man when a gun falls from his pantleg. Deputies are called when a father spits on his son’s girlfriend. Officers respond when a child is bitten by two large dogs.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers engage in a high-speed chase with a motorcyclist. A man becomes verbally abusive with a woman and her mother after a boating trip. Police seize a rifle and 20 rounds of ammo from a man.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers give chase to a suspect on a bike. The passenger of a vehicle is arrested for possession. Police are given a classic "I'm holding it for a friend" excuse.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man is arrested for stealing a large amount of copper wire from a business owner. A bicyclist is charged with possession and public intoxication. A man is pulled over for expired tags.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A chase becomes a flash flood when a fleeing driver runs into a fire hydrant. An insolent domestic violence suspect claims his girlfriend is a habitual 9-1-1 caller. Officers recover a cornucopia of contraband from a gun-toting couple.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A fleeing vehicle goes for a spin when officers execute a perfect PIT maneuver. Cops try to flush out a suspect who barricades himself inside a donut shop. Officers hit the meth mother lode when they stop a truck in a downpour.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A belligerent gun-toting man doesn't take too well to some harsh parental criticism. A bike rider tries to outpace a policeman then pretends to be someone else. Officers try to coax a rattled hit-and-run driver into coming clean.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An officer pulls over an erratic driver while on the way to a shots fired call. An officer attempts to stop a resistant motorcyclist. Officers respond to a domestic violence call involving an intoxicated man and a woman with warrants.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: When officers approach, a suspect flees into a fast food restaurant. A driver takes his granny's wheels for a dangerous spin with cops in pursuit. Sheriffs catch up to a man who fled the scene of a possible domestic battery.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A high speed chase comes to a halt in a residential area and the driver is taken in for sobriety testing. A suspicious vehicle takes off as an officer approaches and a high speed chase ensues. An officer pulls over a vehicle belonging to a battery suspect who attempts to eat evidence.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers stop a man riding a bicycle in the middle of the street with no backlight. Suspects have a fun night out in a neighborhood known for drugs. Officers are dispatched to help a woman when her boyfriend threatens her with a brick.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: During a routine traffic stop, an Officer recognizes the passengers from a prior drug related arrest. A K-9 unit assists in the pursuit of a grand theft auto suspect who flees on foot. An arrest is made after a couple leaving a known drug house is pulled over and questioned.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: Bad Fences make for Bad Neighbors
programme.desc: Officers are involved in a high-speed pursuit of suspected larcenists. Officers give a driver a sobriety test. Officers report to a call of a dispute in a neighborhood.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers pursue a motorcyclist driving erratically. Deputies find broken drug paraphernalia in a car when conducting a traffic stop. A man who beat up his girlfriend hides from officers in an attic.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers rescue a man from a rushing river. A suspect taunts officers during a slow-speed chase. Officers assist a rescue team with extraction from a car. An officer assists in an apartment fire.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A stealthy robbery suspect leads officers on a chase through backyards. After dropping a bag of meth, a man swears he’s only seen the drug on TV. A doped-up domestic violence suspect tries to claim self-defense.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies confront a man holding a knife to his roommate’s neck over a prior argument. A suspect runs from Deputies on a warrant charge. Suspected robbers are pulled over by Deputies.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers give chase to a suspect driving a stolen vehicle. A bio-hazard bin an illegal knife and drugs are found during a traffic stop. Agents go undercover in an area known for heavy drug activity.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A motorcyclist refuses to stop for the police and later tries to escape on foot. A pedestrian is found to have a large soda cup full of anything but soda. A man calls for police help when he’s verbally attacked on a city bus.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An officer assists a routine traffic stop which results in a DUI arrest. A drug related arrest is made in a high crime area. A man with a revoked driver’s license is placed under arrest and a prostitute is let go with a warning.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officer ends up in a foot pursuit after pulling over a suspicious vehicle with expired tags. A recovering addict is caught with drug paraphernalia in her backpack. A man is served an arrest warrant for sexual battery.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: When a driver fails to stop, a freeway pursuit ensues. Officers investigate a suspicious car parked in a commercial parking lot. Officers respond to a shoplifting call.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers encounter an unusual situation where the victim and suspect have defiantly barricaded themselves inside the house. Officers respond to a domestic dispute at a nearby apartment complex.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers detect a strong odor of marijuana during a routine traffic stop. A woman tells Officers her inebriated boyfriend smashed a window. Police investigate a suspicious vehicle parked behind a cemetery.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man tells deputies the pants he has on aren’t his. Officers are called to the scene of men firing an AK-47. A nervous driver fesses up to the deputy who stopped him.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Unhappy about getting stopped for drinking while biking, a man takes off on foot. A woman in her PJs doesn’t know how she wound up in a stolen vehicle. Officers discover a couple smoking Meth in front of a young child.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers apprehend a man in possession of stolen property brandishing a rifle. Officers respond to a call of brothers in a fist fight. Police intervene when a couple argues in the middle of the street.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A vehicle is caught traveling in the opposite direction. A sting operation is designed to nab suspects who purchase narcotics. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a local thrift store.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An officer struggles with a man reaching for something in his pocket. A man won’t cop to the gun in his backseat. Police arrive on the scene when a man threatens to shoot his wife.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect attempts to discard drugs during a foot chase. A man fails to pull over for minor infraction and then bails out his car on foot. A man is arrested after being spotted in a drug transaction.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies are called to a vehicle burglary in progress at an apartment complex. A traffic stop results in the discovery of drug paraphernalia. An Officer locates a stolen van and discovers drug paraphernalia in the suspect’s purse.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect in a traffic stop decides to handle the situation by screaming at the police. Officers have a close encounter with a suspect who admits that he has hidden contraband. A man’s clothing choices tip police off to possible criminal behavior.

programme.desc: An alien boards Moya, deranging the crew.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: An old PK recording reveals Aeryn as one of the murderers of Moya's original pilot.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: A fortunetelling portrait acquired from a passing trader turns out to be the tool of an old enemy. With Ben Browder.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: Crichton and the crew desperately search for food to nurse an ailing friend back to health, but they may have to sacrifice a friend to save one.

programme.title: Farscape

programme.desc: After an enemy ship fires on Moya, crew members find that their personalities have been switched. With Ben Browder.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: Contact with a mysterious light source creates three separate Crichtons from different rungs of the evolutionary ladder.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.sub-title: Look at the Princess: A Kiss Is but a Kiss

programme.title: Farscape
programme.sub-title: Look at the Princess: I Do, I Think
programme.desc: A quick turn of events sees Crichton chosen as the unwilling groom-to-be in the upcoming royal wedding.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.sub-title: Look at the Princess: The Maltese Crichton
programme.desc: Someone removes Crichton's head from a statue; Aeryn examines her choices; Zhaan faces a Moya builder.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: A crew member falls prey to a shape-shifting parasite and the rest of the crew must locate it before it is too late.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: Crichton becomes a mental slave on a commerce planet and must trust his greatest enemy, Scorpius, to help him see the truth through the illusions.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: The crew races to save Crichton after contact with a Hyper Stream of Time speeds up his aging process.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: The crew faces death after a Plokavian ship meets its fate under suspicious circumstances. With Ben Browder.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: Chiana's unknowing part in the Nebari scheme to control a portion of the galaxy is revealed after they take over the Moya.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.sub-title: Liars, Guns and Money: A Not So Simple Plan
programme.desc: Stark plans to rob a less-than-reputable bank to get them money for a sizeable purchase of slaves, but things don't quite go the way he thought.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.sub-title: Liars, Guns and Money: With Friends Like These
programme.desc: Infected currency from the Shadow Depository threatens the crew of the Moya as they decide how best to rescue D'Argo's son.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.sub-title: Liars, Guns and Money: Plan B
programme.desc: The crew of the injured Moya must rely on the help of disorganized mercenaries to save Crichton from Scorpius.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: An alien surgeon comes to the aid of Crichton, removing the control chip from his head and healing the Moya.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: The Moya's crew must quickly recover from their last adventure because Scorpius is up to his old tricks.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: An outrageous love triangle ignites dangerous sparks aboard a space station, where the crew find themselves trapped during a powerful interstellar storm.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: Crichton learns the elusive technology that could allow him to return home to Earth, but while he is preoccupied with the consequences a crew member unsuspectingly nears death.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.sub-title: Self-Inflicted Wounds: Wait for the Wheel
programme.desc: A crew member must volunteer to stay behind to guide the sabotaged ship, knowing that it will soon be atomized.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: The crew goes back in time at an ancient battle site. With Ben Browder and Claudia Black.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: D'Argo, Chiana and Jool (Anthony Simcoe, Gigi Edgley, Tammy MacIntosh) are preyed upon by brain-sucking aliens and corpse-eating Xarai.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: The crew must travel to a warring planet to obtain medicine for Talyn, who was injured in a skirmish with a Peacekeeper Retrieval Squad.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: A giant Budong swallows the crew. With Ben Browder and Claudia Black.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: Parasitic Energy Riders hitch a ride on Moya, planning to plant themselves inside the bodies of the crew.

programme.title: Hudson's Bay
programme.desc: The adventures of Banner and Falcon.

programme.title: The Adventures of Champion
programme.desc: An escaped outlaw rejoins his old gang and plans his next heist.

programme.title: The Adventures of Champion
programme.desc: Rebel is hurt by a porcupine and Ricky gets help for him from a new southern doctor who just arrived in town.

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean
programme.desc: Miguel inherits a silver mine from his father, but two con men stake a claim on it.

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean
programme.desc: The judge tries to do a favor for an old friend, but he finds himself involved in a marriage proposal.

programme.title: Annie Oakley
programme.desc: Annie becomes suspicious of Elaine Forbes, the seemingly innocent niece of a recently deceased rancher.

programme.title: Annie Oakley
programme.desc: Outlaw Vic Carver (Robert B. Williams) seeks revenge against Sheriff MacTavish (Kenneth MacDonald) for sending him to jail.

programme.title: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: Army payroll messengers are found dead, murdered by a gang of bandits, and the payroll stolen; in order to find the killers, Hawkeye and Chingachcook go undercover as managers of a local trading post.

programme.title: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: Fur trader McKenzie initiates a war between the Hurons and the nearby settlement where another trader is taking his business.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A Deputy U.S. Marshal arrives to escort a man to California to testify against a gang; guest Dan Duryea.

programme.title: Wildfire
programme.desc: Two horse-traders (Bob Steele, Sterling Holloway) find their problem is a rustler (John Miljan), not a wild horse.

programme.title: Grand Canyon Trail
programme.desc: Not long after ambitious prospector J. Malcolm Vanderpool takes an interest in the run-down remnants of a small frontier town, fortune seekers from all over rush to gain a silver mine of their own.

programme.title: Jesse James Rides Again
programme.desc: On the run from the law over false charges, Jesse James and his friend find refuge in a small town threatened by a gang trying to claim the oil deposits beneath it. While there, he meets a pretty woman and father who are in danger.

programme.title: The Star Packer
programme.desc: Marshal John Travers investigates the murder of a town's sheriff, makes it his mission to restore order to the town and bring down a bandit called the Shadow.

programme.title: Raiders of Red Gap
programme.desc: The Lone Rider (Bob Livingston) and his sidekick (Al "Fuzzy" St. John) crunch an Arizona grazing-land monopoly.

programme.title: The Sundowners
programme.desc: Texas brothers (Robert Preston, Robert Sterling) feud over land and cattle, with a younger brother between them.

programme.title: The Courageous Avenger
programme.desc: A law officer tries to bring a traitorous mine foreman to justice.

programme.title: Born to Battle
programme.desc: Cattlemen offer a jailed cowboy his freedom if he will agree to help locate a gang of notorious rustlers.

programme.title: Brothers of the West
programme.desc: Detective Tom Wade (Tom Tyler) has to investigate the truth behind a robbery and murder of a bank president that's being blamed on Tom's brother, Ed (Bob Terry), who is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Sitting Bull
programme.desc: President Grant helps a cavalry major (Dale Robertson) condemned for helping Dakota Chief Sitting Bull (J. Carrol Naish).

programme.title: 'Neath Canadian Skies
programme.desc: A Mountie (Russell Hayden) tracks mine robbers in 1890s Canada.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A hired hand (Claude Akins) victimizes the Cartwrights' disabled neighbor (Harry Townes).

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Outlaws plot to steal a trunk containing the savings of a religious group heading for a new life in the West.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Cartwrights' neighbor (Franchot Tone), a former soldier and lawman, seeks security for his daughter.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: Eunice gets her big break on "The Gong Show!" Also: An interview with the wife of a kidnap victim.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: Mr. Tudball is in hot water with his wife. Then, a nervous woman finds her spouse pushing her buttons.

programme.title: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: Flip Wilson and Vikki Carr choose to accept Carol's mission: to appear in the spoof "Mission: Improbable".

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: Bernadette Peters & Tim Conway star in "As The Stomach Turns" spoofing "The Exorcist" in the process.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: Guest Tim Conway breaks up Harvey in "The Dentist." Also: Carol looks to steal the show from a Broadway star.

programme.title: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: Tim Conway plays a 35 year old orphan looking to be adopted.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: Vincent Price and Eydie Gorme star. Features an encounter on an elevator & the movie spoof "House Of Terror."

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: Anthony Newley & Dick Martin appear in a tribute to movie detectives, and Carol & Vicki are ready to mingle.

programme.title: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: Tonight's guests: Maggie Smith and Tim Conway!

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: Sketches include Carol as an old lady feeding birds, Tim as a wacky pharmacist, and Carol & Vicki on a cruise.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: Paul Sand guests! Sketches dealing with weddings are featured. Also: bits related to the energy crisis.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: Nanette Fabray and Steve Lawrence guest star in an episode saluting Columbia Pictures classic movies.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter confronts the entire police department to defend the actions of a Chinese-American policewoman.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall cope with the double and triple-crossing of a criminal who once saved Hunter's life.

programme.title: The Vampire
programme.desc: A small-town doctor (John Beal) cannot stop taking the pills that turn him into a fanged killer.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' Invisible Man
programme.desc: An important scientist decides to walk away from his groundbreaking research as he makes a critical discovery; Brady must find him and convince him to return to his work before foreign agents steal his secrets.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' Invisible Man
programme.desc: Brady provides help to a friend that gets trapped in a cave-in with a bomb that will detonate if a shadow hits it.

programme.title: The Day the Earth Caught Fire
programme.desc: British reporters (Leo McKern, Edward Judd) and a weatherwoman (Janet Munro) get the facts after U.S./Soviet same-day nuclear tests.

programme.title: Giant From the Unknown
programme.desc: Dr. Frederick Cleveland and his daughter Janet are joined by Wayne Brooks in the pursuit of artifacts from Vargas, a giant 500-year-old Spanish conquistador. When a lightning storm interrupts their search, the long-lost Vargas returns to life!

programme.title: Hangar 18
programme.desc: Astronauts and a NASA scientist (Darren McGavin) expose a White House staffer's (Robert Vaughn) cover-up of an occupied UFO.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: A mad scientist threatens to generate a gigantic earthquake that will destroy Metropolis. The citizens must abandon the city and return the land to the descendents of the original Native American inhabitants.

programme.title: D.O.A.
programme.desc: A dying accountant (Edmond O'Brien) has a few days left to find out who spiked his drink with poison and why.

programme.title: Man With a Camera
programme.desc: Mike uses a picture to prove an old man's innocence.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: A comet is out of control because a mad scientist pulled it closer in order to study it. The comet accelerates and the path leads to Earth.

programme.title: Suddenly
programme.desc: A hit man (Frank Sinatra) and company plan to shoot the president when he gets off his train in Suddenly, Calif.

programme.title: Dick Tracy
programme.desc: Detective Tracy (Morgan Conway) rescues Tess Trueheart (Anne Jeffreys) and Junior from a killer called Splitface (Mike Mazurki).

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: A determined team tracked the flamboyant crime boss John Gotti, who assumed control of the Gambino crime family in 1985.

programme.title: Daring Capers
programme.desc: A burglar scales high-rise buildings to steal from lavish apartments.

programme.title: Mike Hammer
programme.desc: Mike has to give some hoodlums a lesson in manners after a pretty thief is paroled into his care.

programme.title: Interpol Investigates
programme.desc: Serial killer Charles Sobhraj spent years evading the police by constantly changing his identity.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: A department employee helps her son, a serial killer, escape from the police.

programme.title: The Lawless Years
programme.desc: A New York cop fights organized crime in the Roaring '20s.

programme.title: The Life With Larry Mazza
programme.desc: After serving a 10-year sentence, Larry goes on to write a book called The Life in which he pulls back the curtain on the hidden world of La Cosa Nostra; Larry exposes the criminal society of the New York mafia.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: The Daily Planet gets a letter from a scientist who threatens to turn his ray gun on Metropolis at midnight.

programme.title: Mr. Sardonicus
programme.desc: A 19th-century aristocrat forces a doctor (Ronald Lewis) to cure his face: frozen by shock in a hideous grin.

programme.title: Black Sunday
programme.desc: Burned at the stake, a vampire witch princess (Barbara Steele) wakes up centuries later with her undead henchman.

programme.title: Cheddy Ace
programme.desc: After taking out a "hood loan" to invest in a janky business a year earlier, Cheddy Ace is faced with repaying the loan to a pair of thugs within 24 hours. Desperate to pay his debt, Cheddy and his nephews try everything to help him raise it.

programme.title: Captured
programme.desc: Jessica Johnson, a journalist, has just learned that her brother has died. Upon moving into his apartment to pick up his belongings she notices an old camera. She has no idea about the secrets behind the camera left behind. It's only a matter of time before she begins to hear and see visions only behind the camera or whenever the camera is near. Is it real? or is she hallucinating?

programme.title: Cake
programme.desc: Young pastry chef, Ronnie, dreams of opening her own bakery, but friends, family, and her love life have plans of their own.

programme.title: Choppa City Queens
programme.desc: Best friends Leah, Jada and Shanice lose their jobs, are unable to find new work, and struggling to make ends meet. One day, Leah comes across a gunrunner hiding a bag of AK-47’s. Leah strikes up a deal with him to buy his guns and sell them on the black-market. Things start going well with the women selling guns until Shanice’s boyfriend, Marquis, finds out the truth. Marquis and his cousin Berg then decide they are going to steal the guns from the woman and set up their own operation.

programme.title: Class Dismissed
programme.desc: When an unemployed actress finds herself broke and sleeping on her best friend’s couch, she is forced to get a job as a substitute teacher working with one student. She soon realizes that it takes real super powers to deal with this “classroom terror” and dysfunctional staff.

programme.title: Make it Rain
programme.desc: After struggling to find a job following graduation, Mone' is enticed by her best friend Lala to audition at a local strip club. She enters the seductive underworld of the strip club, experiencing financial success and personal challenges. As Mone' navigates the dark side of the industry, she must confront betrayal, addiction, tragedy, and ultimately find the strength to rebuild her life and pursue her dreams.

programme.title: Curse of a Father
programme.desc: A father’s horrible mistake causes a lifetime of pain for his children. His son tries his best to live a normal life, but his childhood trauma follows him into his marriage. He must face his trauma head on to break this generational curse.

programme.title: Kinfolk
programme.desc: Eboni, is a hair stylist dreaming of owning a successful salon in her hometown. Her feuding family complicates her plans, but her dedication and drive, along with the support of her half-siblings Beau and Hillary. Meanwhile, their estranged father's attempts to reconcile with his past create further challenges.

programme.title: Dream on Dreamer
programme.desc: Mario's life unravels when he quits med school for acting, angering his wife, Erica, who leaves with their daughter. His friend Derrick faces his own crisis with his side chick. Desperate, they turn to Mario's drug-dealing brother, Paul. This leads them into the dangerous world of Queen Pin Malkia, where their lives are put at risk.

programme.title: Quiet as Kept
programme.desc: Jay is unlawfully detained. His ex-girlfriend returns, and his business partners work to clear his name. Meanwhile, a crooked cop is under suspicion for murder, and connections are made between him and Jay. Torn between duty and loyalty, Detective Johnson is caught in the middle. As the prosecution struggles, Jay and his business partners work to exist the dangerous world cleanly.

programme.title: The Special Affect
programme.desc: Expecting mother & artist, Destiny, spirals after a tragic loss. Her loving husband helps her cope, but a bad trip and missed meds spark disturbing memories. With the help of her best friend, Destiny uncovers a horrifying truth about her past.

programme.title: Roseland
programme.desc: JuJu, is a young man who grew up in the Roseland community all his life. Him and his best friend, Good-Game, go on a wild summer spree of sheisty exploits, causing the entire hood of petty thugs to chase them on a rollercoaster ride of wild escapades. Life takes a fateful turn when the love of his life, and everyone who cares about him, try to advise him to slow down his wild ride.

programme.title: Battered Emotions
programme.desc: Rasheada has accepted that her battle with breast cancer is inevitable but her spiritual fight is still as strong as ever. She continues her upbeat facade for friends and family, but is unsure how long it will be until she can no longer compete with her emotional life's journey. Her sister, Tara, and her best friend, Bunny, struggle with their own issues of inner demons and domestic violence, while trying to support Rasheada through her battle.

programme.title: Bakerz Union
programme.desc: Winston, your local hood mailman and his bootlegging friend Greg, can't seem to catch a break. Well their luck is about to change when these two layabouts accidentally intercept a fresh batch of marijuana in the mail, they launch a new edibles empire. However, when the intended recipient notices his missing weed, this new money-making scheme may create more problems than it solves.

programme.title: Battered Emotions 2
programme.desc: Follows the story of Bunny Taylor, when her life takes another unfortunate turn following the death of her best friend Rasheeda, along with getting back with her abusive boyfriend Darius. Bunny finds out she’s pregnant, and Darius claims the baby is not his. Fearing for her and her child’s life, Bunny decides to leave, but leaving will not be an easy journey for her.

programme.title: 1-800 Missing
programme.desc: Driven by the disappearance of his daughter, Kevin, an undercover cop, vows to bring her home. Chicago's missing become his personal mission. He joins forces with his partners, determined to take down the toughest kidnappers and reunite all the missing children with their families.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Crystal gets a fistful of hair when she confronts her boyfriend about his mistress.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: SpringerCam joins Sam on a trucking trip where he professes his love and devotion for two women. Then Edward is here to confess to his wife that he's been having an affair with her sister! When the two sisters confront Edward, he's goin' home alone!

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: James tells his fiancee that he's cheating with Melanie. Jewel and Christa compete for Mistress Shock's love!

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Solo has a few things he needs to tell his best friend and girlfriend, Vixen.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Glenda has been hiding two secrets from her boyfriend: She's secretly been seeing her ex and she wants to be a stripper! Then Veronica broke up with Roland when she caught him cheating. Now she's dating one of his friends and Roland wants her back.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Wayne doesn't know his fiancee, Kristin, is sleeping with her cousin! Next Springer Cam is there when JB drops the bomb on both of his girlfriends and tells them he's been cheating. Later Vinnie is sleeping with his best friend's fiancee, Shannon.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Donna, 600 pounds, confronts her blind husband and angry kids about how they’re responsible for her health.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Paul and Lori have been married for 10 years, but Lori's been having an affair with Paul's uncle, Kenny.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Sanqueata says that she’s ready to marry Calvin, but he's not! Rian wants to marry Cherie.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Mary's busts her husband Bill in bed with her cousin, Elizabeth.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Today Mark will be forced to choose between his lover, Amy, and his wife.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Sylvia loves one-night-stands and faces her angry sister Jackqueline for sleeping with her man! Then, Greg’s one-night stand left him doubting his long-term relationship!

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Sarah's here for Jonathan. The only problem is Lana, her best friend, who just happens to be Jonathan's girlfriend. Next Kung-fu family feud! David's here to let his brother, Lil Wayne, know that he has been sleeping with his girlfriend Ashley.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Melody is horrified that her sister is dating a 54 year old loser named Wolf.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Denny weighs over 800 pounds and has been unable to leave his bed for the past 5 weeks and is ready to change.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Meet Taz and others with this bizarre lifestyle: adult babies. They wear diapers and drink milk from a bottle.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Sarah’s ready to fight to get her sister-in-law Bobbie out of her life. Guy confronts his wife’s lover Merc!

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.sub-title: I Stole My Best Friend's Man
programme.desc: Jimmy reveals his affair with his girlfriend's bestfriend Evoni. Derek's affair with girlfriend's best friend.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Greg is here to tell Kim that he wants to start dating Mandy. Shannon confronts her man for having an affair.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: David’s love triangle is about to fall apart. Barb confronts Tony about his lingering ex, but she blames Barb.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Will Heather take Dan back? Ginny wants Tim back! Shenidia won't let another woman steal her man!

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.sub-title: A Father's Fight for His Daughter
programme.desc: Robert believes his daughter is being abused and molested by her stepfather, John, but John and Tiffany denies any abuse. Is Tiffany covering for John’s abuse? See the shocking lie detector test today!

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.sub-title: I Got a Bad Feeling About This
programme.desc: Ashley and DeNorris accuse each other of cheating; Jim denies having sex with his fiancee's sister and underage girls.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Eric and Lisa are divorced and Eric is now dating Keri. Both Eric and Keri feel like Lisa is stalking them by sending him text messages and naked pictures. Then, Christopher has been unable to trust Olivia and thinks she may be cheating again.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Troy admits to sleeping with Kela’s friend during “a break”. Now that they're together, is he sleeping around?

programme.title: Trisha
programme.sub-title: Which of These Men Is the Father?
programme.desc: After 23 years of lies, Angela wants to know who her biological dad is. Is Cody the father of Tanickia's baby?

programme.title: Trisha
programme.sub-title: Your Dad May Not Be Your Father!
programme.desc: William says he slept with Kiesha’s mother and could be her father. Did Buddy father Aisha's daughter?

programme.title: Trisha
programme.sub-title: Stop My Grandma From Dressing So Sexy!
programme.desc: Imagine if your grandmother dressed in revealing clothes! These guests want makeovers for these "Hot Mamas"!

programme.title: Trisha
programme.sub-title: My Butt Implants Almost Killed Me!
programme.desc: Renee’s quest for the perfect butt almost cost her her life. Justin has had over 100 plastic surgeries.

programme.title: Trisha
programme.sub-title: I'm Devastated My Girls Date Black Men
programme.desc: Casey is upset that her daughters are dating black men. Marcus is biracial and hates being half black.

programme.title: The Perfect Husband (What Lies Within)
programme.desc: Viola and Nicola are going through a rough time. To overcome this crisis, they decide to spend a weekend in a remote cabin belonged to Nicola's parents. Just a couple of days together to heal their wounds, , but everything will take a turn for the worst, when a sneaking suspicion become pure madness. What was supposed to be a quiet trip will suddenly slip into a deadly nightmare.

programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: Miguel llama del penal a Andreina para que se ocupe de su hijo, su madre ya no lo puede cuidar mas. Pero ella le pide que no la llame mas y que haga lo que le parezca con el. Anselmo se entera por parte de Tomas que Andreina no renuncio a una corona por amor sino por un hijo. Rosa lleva a Leonardo Alfonso a la clinica psiquiatrica porque tiene que ver a Helena cuando llegan ven a Patricia que esta llorando y muy angustiada. Inocencia no le cree a Felisberto que no la engana. Andreina le pide a Miguel que no la atormente mas pero el le dice que su hijo no tiene con quien estar.

programme.title: Episodio 76
programme.desc: Maria Celeste era una joven dulce y alegre que ha sido criada por Martirio Paniagua, una mujer pobre pero honrada. Maria Celeste esta convencida de que Martirio es su madre, pero se equivoca; ella es, en realidad, hija de una joven millonaria que fue desheredada en los anos setenta por casarse con un musico “rockero”. Cuando sus padres murieron tragicamente, la pequena Maria Celeste quedo en manos de Martirio, una gran amiga de su madre, quien la inscribio como propia y la crio a la par de su verdadera hija, Irania. - Obligada a buscar trabajo para ayudar en la casa, Maria Celeste llega por casualidad al Consorcio Hidalgo, sin saber que esa importante empresa pertenece a su abuelo materno, Don Patricio Hidalgo

programme.title: Muneca de Trapo
programme.desc: Es una serie repleta de ternura y amor que nos invita a conocer el mundo a traves de los ojos de una encantadora nina de cuatro anos, quien nos hara reir y llorar. A pesar de su corta edad, tambien nos llevara a reflexionar, pues en cada capitulo se transmite un hermoso mensaje que ensena a los ninos y hace un poco mejor a los adultos. Muneca de Trapo es huerfana de madre y vive con su padre y su abuelita. Carlos Alberto, su padre, es un joven ejecutivo de grandes ideales y un corazon bondadoso, que adora a su hija y desea lo mejor para ella. Tal vez por este amor tan profundo, nunca se ha vuelto a casar. Dona Juanita, la abuela, vive por su hijo y su nieta, dedicando todos sus cuidados y mimos para que en su hogar siempre reine la felicidad y la armonia. En Muneca de Trapo, tambien disfrutaremos de las travesuras de los amiguitos del barrio, quienes, junto a ella, viviran las mas diversas y divertidas aventuras.

programme.title: La Vida Entera
programme.desc: Salvador acepta que Kotufa haga una tesis sobre el, pero ella en principio se niega diciendole que ya eligio el tema para realizar su trabajo. Titina esta muy enojada con Tamanaco su hombre de seguridad personal porque ella considera que el se desubico frente de sus amigas en la peluqueria, y el lo que quiere es un poco de respeto porque ella lo vive humillando, pero esto ya no va a ser asi porque el renuncia. En una reunion de la revista Afrodita Facundo Montoya no puede para de pesar en Olimpia y le dice a Vilma que ella continue al frente de la reunion. Salvador da una charla en la universidad y hace participar a Kotufa, pero ella interpreta que el la esta poniendo a prueba todo el tiempo.

programme.title: Los Secreto de Lucia
programme.desc: El Teniente Rincon le avisa a su jefe, don Arsenio que su sobrina Lucia estaba por ir a la hacienda, y asi le da tiempo a este para mandar a reforzar la seguridad. Mientras tanto el Sargento Ruiz, bajo las ordenes del capitan Cardenas, cree que esta siguiendo y vigilando a Rincon, pero en realidad el Teniente ya se les fugo y el no se dio cuenta. A su vez, el Teniente Rincon sigue buscando a Ruben Olmedo quien se ha escapado con un bolso lleno de dolares. Miguel Gaitan, quien estaba buscando a Lucia, la encuentra alrededor de la hacienda y le confiesa su temor porque le pase algo y decide acompanarla a entrar. Mientras tanto,

programme.title: Torrente
programme.desc: Sebastian llora al recordar las palabras de su padre respecto a la identidad de Chari. Reinaldo y Juancho llegan borrachos a la casa y cantan en el patio. Corina y Valeria les piden explicaciones y ellos se les rien en la cara. Paola y su amiga escuchan todo desde otro cuarto y se divierten. Valeria se toma la borrachera de Reinaldo terriblemente pero Corina esta mas acostumbrada a las de Juancho. Martina les lleva cafe para que se les pase la borrachera y les pide que lo beban rapido para que Cayo no los regane a todos. Reinaldo y Juancho eligen seguir bebiendo sus tragos y cantando y Valeria y Corina se van a acostar enojadas con ellos. Todas las criadas estan pendientes de lo que sucede, al igual que Paola y su prima.

programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: Miguel llama del penal a Andreina para que se ocupe de su hijo, su madre ya no lo puede cuidar mas. Pero ella le pide que no la llame mas y que haga lo que le parezca con el. Anselmo se entera por parte de Tomas que Andreina no renuncio a una corona por amor sino por un hijo. Rosa lleva a Leonardo Alfonso a la clinica psiquiatrica porque tiene que ver a Helena cuando llegan ven a Patricia que esta llorando y muy angustiada. Inocencia no le cree a Felisberto que no la engana. Andreina le pide a Miguel que no la atormente mas pero el le dice que su hijo no tiene con quien estar.

programme.title: Episodio 76
programme.desc: Maria Celeste era una joven dulce y alegre que ha sido criada por Martirio Paniagua, una mujer pobre pero honrada. Maria Celeste esta convencida de que Martirio es su madre, pero se equivoca; ella es, en realidad, hija de una joven millonaria que fue desheredada en los anos setenta por casarse con un musico “rockero”. Cuando sus padres murieron tragicamente, la pequena Maria Celeste quedo en manos de Martirio, una gran amiga de su madre, quien la inscribio como propia y la crio a la par de su verdadera hija, Irania. - Obligada a buscar trabajo para ayudar en la casa, Maria Celeste llega por casualidad al Consorcio Hidalgo, sin saber que esa importante empresa pertenece a su abuelo materno, Don Patricio Hidalgo

En Muneca de Trapo, tambien disfrutaremos de las travesuras de los amiguitos del barrio, quienes, junto a ella, viviran las mas diversas y divertidas aventuras.

programme.title: La Vida Entera
programme.desc: Olimpia recibe un cuadro como obsequio de parte de Facundo Montoya, lo que causa un breve malestar con su marido que luego Olimpia relativiza con audacia. Facundo por su parte no deja de sentirse culpable por lo que hizo y hace catarsis con su hija Natalia. Pasion comparte una cena en la casa de Prospero con su madre y padece el no poder ir a su casa ya que en esta se encuentra Laly y Salvador. Julieta no deja de pensar en Salvador, mientras Laly invita a este a “despedirse” antes de su viaje, copa de vino por medio le confiesa su amor y sus deseos de “formalizar” la relacion. Olimpia cree que el envio del cuadro fue un acto de cobardia de parte de Facundo. Kotufa esta preocupada porque cuando su abuela se entere que ella se quedo sin trabajo se pondra mal.

programme.title: Los Secreto de Lucia
programme.desc: Luego de recorrer el tunel Lucia y Miguel llegan a una puerta secreta que da a un cuarto, entran y alla se encuentran con Ayra, la mama de Lucia. Lucia se siente confundida ya que recuerda a esa mujer pero no la reconoce como madre. Llega un empleado y ve la situacion, comienza a pelear con Miguel y en el forcejeo se dispara un tiro. Ese sonido alerta a Arsenio y a toda la seguridad que comienzan rapidamente a buscarla. Miguel y Lucia logran regresar por el tunel, pero esta vez acompanados por Ayra, quien estaba retenida en la hacienda contra su voluntad. Ayra se golpea fuerte la cabeza y se desmaya y Miguel la carga hasta la salida.

programme.title: Torrente
programme.desc: Reinaldo le dice a Ana Julia que el sigue loco por ella y por eso no querria divorciarse de ella cuando ella recupere su identidad y vuelvan a estar casados. Ella le dice que para ella lo unico que cuenta es que el esta casado con Valeria. Paola continua hablandole mal y menospreciando a Benjamin y luego se suma su prima. Paola le dice que ese fue su ultimo dia trabajando alli. Sebastian le dice a su padre que para el es facil decir que debe hacer cada uno porque el nunca estuvo enamorado. Cayo le dice que debe aceptar que enamorarse de Chari fue un error e intenta hacerlo ver que su hijo esta inseguro con un abuelo profugo y una madre ciega que no puede proporcionarle a su hijo los cuidados adecuados.

programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: Andreina le agarra un ataque de locura en la clinica cuando le dicen que esta embarazada. Leonardo Alfonso y Rosa se juran amor eterno y se prometen que nadie los va a separar. Emerson le cuenta toda la verdad de Andreina a Anselmo sobre el embarazo y su novio Miguel que esta preso en E.E U.U. Reinaldo hace el amor con Patricia. La otra Rosa va a la mansion hacer un escandalo y a decirle a Luis Alberto que se va a vivir con el. Felisberto desmiente las fotos que le muestra Inocencia con otras mujeres. Llaman a Leonardo Alfonso para decirle que Andreina tuvo un accidente con su carro.

programme.title: Maria Celeste
programme.desc: Maria Celeste era una joven dulce y alegre que ha sido criada por Martirio Paniagua, una mujer pobre pero honrada. Maria Celeste esta convencida de que Martirio es su madre, pero se equivoca; ella es, en realidad, hija de una joven millonaria que fue desheredada en los anos setenta por casarse con un musico “rockero”. Llaman a Leonardo Alfonso para decirle que Andreina tuvo un accidente con su carro.

programme.title: Kaun Sachcha Kaun Jhootha
programme.desc: Sapna, a Psychiatrist, falls in love with her patient Karan. When Karan gets normal, he asks Sapna to get married. But she disapproves of this relationship. What could be the reason?

programme.title: Daasi
programme.desc: An orphaned girl named Mangla (Moushumi Chatterjee) faces one heartbreak after another. Her marriage is arranged with a blind man, Anand (Sanjeev Kumar), after her former lover betrays her. Initially hesitant to accept him, Mangla eventually falls in love with Anand's caring nature. But when Anand realises that Mangala has been meeting her ex-lover, he drives her out of his house.

programme.title: Shiva
programme.desc: Shiva, a new student at VAS College, decides to stand up against some local goons creating nuisance in his college, despite knowing the fact that they're backed by an influential and ruthless politician.

programme.title: Satta
programme.desc: Anuradha a Delhi based young and dynamic politician moves to Mumbai. Soon she meets Vivek an aspiring politician and marries him. Things take a turn when he is arrested for murder and she has to take his place in the upcoming elections.

programme.title: Swarag Se Sunder
programme.desc: Vijay and Laxmi live happily under the same roof with Vijay's stepbrother Ravi and his wife Lalita. But soon, property issues begin to brew and misunderstandings crop up in the house, threatening to separate them all.

programme.title: Deewaar: Let's Bring Our Heroes Home
programme.desc: A group of Indian POW (Prisoners of War) from the 1971 Indo-Pak war rebels against the Pakistani army and tries to escape from their captivity. Helping the group in the mission is Gaurav, the son of a former Army Major also held captive by the enemy.

programme.title: Doli Saja Ke Rakhna
programme.desc: Two star-crossed lovers are prompted to elope when the girl's burly brothers refuse to let them live in peace. But the overwhelmed youngsters start second guessing their decision when they see life for what it is.​

programme.title: The Eunuch Of The Western Palace
programme.desc: Of all the political factions in China, the most power-hungry is the feared Wang, a Eunuch that will stop at nothing to gain control of the throne. Action ensues when a group of brave expert fighters deliver damning evidence against him.

programme.title: Dragon Blood
programme.desc: Liu travels to the USA from China in search of his relatives and the hopes of finding a peaceful life. However, he has in his possession a sacred dragon medallion that was taken from the Qing court. An assassin from the Qing is sent after him, and soon he discovers that life in the Wild West is no fun at all.

programme.title: Dynamite Trio
programme.desc: The most deadly fighter on earth, a man so dangerous in combat he only uses one hand, and he’s after the greatest book ever written. This book, a tutorial in the "mantis fist", must be protected by an unlikely band of heroes.

programme.title: Samurai Death Bells
programme.desc: The head of the great Dragon Warrior Clan is killed in a duel with the deadly women of the Phoenix School of kung fu, and now succession of the clan falls under doubt.

programme.title: The Eunuch Of The Western Palace
programme.desc: Of all the political factions in China, the most power-hungry is the feared Wang, a Eunuch that will stop at nothing to gain control of the throne. Action ensues when a group of brave expert fighters deliver damning evidence against him.

However, he has in his possession a sacred dragon medallion that was taken from the Qing court. An assassin from the Qing is sent after him, and soon he discovers that life in the Wild West is no fun at all.

programme.desc: Of all the political factions in China, the most power-hungry is the feared Wang, a Eunuch that will stop at nothing to gain control of the throne. Action ensues when a group of brave expert fighters deliver damning evidence against him.

programme.title: Dragon Blood
