programme.title: Bino & Fino
programme.desc: Bino & Fino is about a brother and sister named Bino and Fino who live with their grandparents 'Mama' and 'Papa' in a modern day city in Africa. Bino and Fino have many adventures where, with the help of their friend Zeena the Magic Butterfly, they discover and learn things about the world.

programme.title: Horaci the Inuit
programme.desc: Packed with adventure, fun and excitement, HORACI THE INUIT will transport you to the Lands of the North where, together with his best friend Sedna, he will have to solve all kinds of mysteries! Horaci the Inuit takes place in a remote village and talks about universal values such as caring for nature, being intuitive and open-minded and, above all, having a loving respect for family and friends!

programme.title: Leo the Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: Leo the Wildlife Ranger introduces the secrets and wonders of nature and wildlife around us and kickstarts a curiosity and passion for nature in kids. With engaging missions and adventures, kids have fun while learning positive lessons!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Bernard gets bored trekking across the frozen Arctic wastes. Some abandoned equipment becomes a source of great entertainment, but not for long.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Zack tries to steal a parcel which Bernard is carrying. At first he succeeds, but Bernard doesn't give up that easily.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Even when he's asleep, Bernard is capable of anything – as he finds out when he wakes up in the morning.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Bernard has to deliver a pizza to a haunted house....and to its starving owner. But how is he going to get paid?

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: To the amazement of Zack, Bernard discovers he has some performing skills which he never knew he had.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Although Bernard has been shipwrecked, his real problems begin when he finds an abandoned motorboat which could get him back to shore.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Bernard makes a daring escape from prison, but once he's out, he realises that perhaps life inside wasn't so bad after all.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Brain Candy TV
programme.desc: Early learning for a brighter future! Your children will love to learn their ABCs, numbers, colors and even some math and science with the help of our action-packed vehicles including monster trucks, dump trucks, trains and more, plus our cute dog Lizzy.

programme.title: Yeti Tales

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock’ Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it’s not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Misha, the Purple Cat
programme.desc: Misha is a very lively, alert cat. She is very interested in investigating everything going on around her, which means she has some very entertaining adventures with her friends. Many things can happen in Misha’s world; especially exciting adventures, mysterious investigations, hilarious competitions... all with a feeling of close friendship.

Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it’s not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Double Dragon
programme.desc: The Shadow Master transfers the Double Dragon's into a virtual reality game, where virtual soon becomes reality.

programme.title: Highlander: The Animated Series
programme.desc: An attack on the Dundees leaves Quentin and his sister orphaned. Ramirez arrives to begin Macleod's training.

programme.title: Highlander: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Ramirez is teaching Quentin about balance in a fashion that should seem very familiar to fans of the original film. Nearby, the Dundees are terrorized by a gang sporting a machine gun.

programme.title: Highlander: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Ramirez is teaching Quentin about balance in a fashion that should seem very familiar to fans of the original film. Nearby, the Dundees are terrorized by a gang sporting a machine gun.

programme.title: Highlander: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Ramirez takes Quentin to find Erol, but they are captured by his mortal former assistant, Melvyn.

programme.title: Starla and the Jewel Riders
programme.desc: The peace in Avalon is disrupted when the evil Lady Kale uses dark magic against Merlin…

programme.title: Starla and the Jewel Riders
programme.desc: The Jewel Riders go to Kale's castle to free a captured unicorn and prevent her from taking over all the magic…

programme.title: Starla and the Jewel Riders
programme.desc: The Jewel Riders search for a Crown Jewel, guided by Tamara after she falls under the its influence…

programme.title: Starla and the Jewel Riders
programme.desc: Tamara is caught in an enchantment when she plays a beautiful harp given to her at a craft fair…

programme.title: Love Shriners

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: The Street Sharks are framed and brought out of hiding by Sharkbot, the robotic machine built by Dr. Paradigm. The Street Sharks must once again defend their reputations and take on Sharkbot.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: The Street Sharks discover an underground civilization of mutant crocodiles that happen to know Dr. Bolton after he cured them of their damaged genes. Meanwhile, Dr. Paradigm rebuilds Sharkbot and captures one of the mutant crocodiles.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: Jab and Streex are sent back in time in two different eras by Dr. Paradigm's time machine called the Time Slammer. Back in the present, Slammu, Ripster, and Bends have to deal with Dr. Piranoid's Seaviates who are now joined by Shrimp Louie. With the help of some Atlanteans, Jab is able to travel in time to save his brother Streex.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: Dr. Paradigm creates Tentakill as part of his time-traveling plot to have Killamari go back to the medieval times and kill the Street Shark's ancestor Sir Thomas Bolton. Ripster and Big Slammu hijack Dr. Paradigm's Time Slammer to prevent Sir Thomas Bolton from being killed.

programme.title: Double Dragon
programme.desc: The Double Dragons get transported to an unknown place and now have to find their way back.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic saves a female hedgehog from Scratch and Grounder which Sonic falls in love with, while Dr. Robotnik plans to flood a village by stealing the water from the Mobius reservoir.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic saves a female hedgehog from Scratch and Grounder which Sonic falls in love with, while Dr. Robotnik plans to flood a village by stealing the water from the Mobius reservoir.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic must save a family of sloths from Dr. Robotnik's slow-motion ray, but when he himself is slowed down by Scratch and Grounder, Tails and the sloth family must take action.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Desperate to get workers to build a Robotnik statue, Dr. Robotnik opens Casino Night Zone with his pal Smiley but when Sonic stops Scratch and Grounder, Robotnik traps Tails so Sonic has to make a choice to save his pal.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik imprisons a satirical cartoonist named Sketch Lampoon for making fun of him in his comic book, much to the anger of Sonic, his biggest fan. Sonic purposely allows his own capture as well, but does not expect to be placed in a maximum-security jail cell. With Robotnik angrily sends Sonic in the cell for interfering with his plans once again.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Scratch, Grounder and Coconuts set up a chili-dog trap which then resulted with Tails been captured by a mysterious person so Sonic has to find Tails and for Robotnik and co to capture Sonic.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.sub-title: Close Encounters of the Sonic Kind
programme.desc: While Scratch and Grounder try to catch Sonic using a Suction plate, two aliens, one being a prince, crash lands on Mobius. Sonic meets the prince when he finds out that the prince's baby brother would blow up Mobius which Sonic must save.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik's momma escapes from the home for mothers of villains and demands her birthday present! When she endangers Sonic and Tails, and they manage to have her taken back to the home, even Robotnik is glad to see her go.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Coconuts is exiled by Robotnik to a remote jungle, where he uses a giant baby ape to destroy villages. But Sonic exposes Coconuts as a robot, and the baby ape's real Dad takes Coconuts and the baby ape away for a spanking.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: A country and western singer released a song about Sonic which is making Dr. Robotnik mad and builds a music destroyer robot.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: An energetic salesman named Wes Weasley sells Robotnik numerous gadgets to help Scratch and Grounder capture Sonic. However, Robotnik later comes to regret it when Weaseley's gadgets keep backfiring.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails rescue Lucas, Robotnik's first prisoner, and attempt to reunite him with his girlfriend, Lucinda. However, Robotnik is also in love with Lucinda, and pursues Lucas.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: En route to stop a train of explosives from arriving at Robotnik's munition factory, Sonic and Tails must deal with a duo of bears named Big Griz and Big Mike after Scratch and Grounder tell them that Sonic and Tails are the enemies.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik takes Professor Von Schlemmer hostage and uses his growth machine to try and enlarge himself. However, the machine backfires, and enlarges Tails instead in nearby Wienerville. Sonic must keep the famished Tails from getting into more danger as Robotnik tricks the citizens into thinking that Sonic is the villain, while Robotnik is the hero planning to save the city.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sonic decides to find Tails a suitable foster home to ensure his safety, Robotnik finds out and creates a robot fox family, who pose as Tails' long-lost parents.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When overweight, elderly superhero Captain Rescue bungles in his attempts to help Sonic, he grows tired of his incompetence. Robotnik then uses Captain Rescue to successfully imprison Sonic in an impenetrable force field, and Tails and Captain Rescue must save him.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Scratch suffers a blow to the head and believes that he is his favorite television character, Edgar Eagle. Sonic uses this to his advantage in preventing another of Robotnik's schemes.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: There is a Sonic Appreciation Day happening where Sonic is the guest in a hotel. However, someone steals his power sneakers and now Sonic and Tails have to find the culprit.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails adopts a cute and fuzzy pet named Walter who turns out to be a black hole who sucks up everything in Mobius. Realizing that Walter is from another dimension our heroes have to return him and they soon find themselves spinning through interdimensional limbo.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik opens up a resort to make the resident Mobians his slaves, Sonic enlists the help of some robots from an area of Mobius called Scrap Valley.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik creates a robot Sonic suit with the intent of ruining the hedgehog's reputation. He forces a lab rat named Laurence to pilot by threatening his parents.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Dr. Robotnik creates a genius chip so he would have enough brains to rule Mobius, however a computer hacker got hold of it which then the chip landed inside Grounder causing him to be smart.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic leaves Tails in charge of protecting a squirrel village food supply, when he zips off to stop a dam from breaking. Robotnik sends Scratch and Grounder after Tails, who defends himself the best he can with Home Alone booby traps for Scratch and Grounder. When Tails is finally caught, Sonic speeds back to save him.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik introduces the Ultra Freeze-O-Matic, announcing his plan to freeze every citizen on Mobius so that he can install Servitude Chips into the frozen citizens and make them unquestionably obedient. Sonic and Tails must foil the scheme.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik invades Labyrinth, an underwater city, and kidnaps Princess Bubbles, a seahorse-dude named Surff seeks Sonic's help. It seems Surff and the Princess are in love, but the royal family deems Surff unworthy. Sonic, Tails and Surff must avoid the undersea traps and Mobius sea monsters while Sonic rescues the Princess and reunites her with Surff -- making it look like Surff did the whole thing.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik reprograms a machine created by Von Schlemmer capable of turning dreams into reality, unleashing a Nightmare Monster upon Mobius.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When S and G rocket to outer space to mine a radioactive mineral from asteroids, Sonic and Tails stow away. Through a blunder by the robots, all are stranded in space, and Robotnik tries to blow all of them out of the stars. Sonic builds a rocket out of S and G's spare parts, and all return to Mobius.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik's attempt to turn Sonic into an old man with his newest device backfires, turning him and Tails, and later himself, into babies. Now stuck in a day-care, the infantile Sonic and Tails must try to keep Robotnik under control, while Scratch and Grounder attempt to get him back.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik plans to block out the sun and extinguish all life and nature on the planet Mobius. Then he creates a robot son and tries to train him in the ways of wickedness. But when Robotnik Jr. meets Sonic, he becomes a naturalist and teams up with Sonic to thwart Robotnik's evil scheme.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik invents an electron altering generator which makes Scratch and Grounder twice as fast as Sonic. When they lose it and Tails picks it up, Tails speeds through the Mobius countryside leaving disasters and accidents in his wake. Seeing this, Robotnik convinces the villagers that the little fox belongs in jail, and Tails is forced to flee. With Tails all alone, Scratch and Grounder attack, and Sonic makes a last minute rescue.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a Kangaroo named MacHopper, and uses his brain-wipe-reprogramming-computer to transform him into a resourceful demolitions expert (Ala MacGiver). But Mac escapes before Robotnik installs the final Get Sonic program, and teams up with Sonic and Tails to BLAST Robotnik.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic joins up with a group of Dr. Robotnik's rejects who have been banished to the dump and helps them understand that their shortcomings were really their strengths.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When S and G rocket to outer space to mine a radioactive mineral from asteroids, Sonic and Tails stow away. Through a blunder by the robots, all are stranded in space, and Robotnik tries to blow all of them out of the stars. Sonic builds a rocket out of S and G's spare parts, and all return to Mobius.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When a Rebel Base is threatened by Robotnik, Sonic and Tails team up with Big Mike and Da Bears to run a booby-trapped gauntlet in their gigantic Road Warrior-like truck, breaking through every obstacle S and G put in their way until they save the rebels.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik pretends to retire, and lures Sonic and Tails into a phony vacation resort, laden with booby-traps set by Scratch and Grounder. But Sonic takes the bungee jumping, hang gliding, and skydiving in stride, and gives the bashes the bots.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik and a rival named Quark Rex try to cooperate in capturing Sonic. However, Sonic tricks them into becoming enemies, and they try to outdo each other.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Coconuts acquires a magic wand and magical gadgets from Wes Weasley (after agreeing to forward all payments to Robotnik), and attempts to master them. Meanwhile, Robotnik tries to change Sonic-themed mobium banknotes into Robotnik banknotes in the Mobius Mint.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: A country and western singer released a song about Sonic which is making Dr. Robotnik mad and builds a music destroyer robot.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: An energetic salesman named Wes Weasley sells Robotnik numerous gadgets to help Scratch and Grounder capture Sonic. However, Robotnik later comes to regret it when Weaseley's gadgets keep backfiring.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails rescue Lucas, Robotnik's first prisoner, and attempt to reunite him with his girlfriend, Lucinda. However, Robotnik is also in love with Lucinda, and pursues Lucas.

programme.title: The Littlest Witch
programme.desc: On an errand to Witch Haven for Papa Smurf, the little blue creatures meet a tiny witch and teach her how to be good while at the same time cause another witch to lose her wicked powers for one year after she falls into the river.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: In the distant valley of Nodrog, the Smurfs meet the Molians who try to dissuade them from obtaining the magical Smurf-stone that Papa Smurf needs to cure his gout.

programme.title: Smurfy Acres
programme.desc: The Smurfs learn there's no place like home when Gargamel gets the Book of Spells to conjure up a new and more beautiful place for the Smurfs to live; a place that is very convenient for him to lay a trap for them!

programme.title: Wedding Bells For Gargamel
programme.desc: The Smurfs befriend a maiden in distress who is betrothed to Gargamel by convincing her father that the foolish wizard is insane.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs help a fairy queen outwit the evil fairy Fallon who tries to take away her son's magic rattle.

programme.title: All Creatures Great And Smurf
programme.desc: Nat Smurf is convinced he can help all creatures with his healing ways, even the wicked Azrael after he gets his paw caught in a trap. He heals well, but even though he is tempted to stay with the Smurfs, he runs back to Gargamel while leading his old master away from Smurf Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: The Smurf Who Would Be King
programme.desc: Dreamy yearns to be King after reading a story about them. He falls through a whirlpool while on his ship and finds himself in the land of pokies who think Dreamy is their long-lost King. When he confronts the pokies' enemies, the Norfnags, he finds they aren't fearful at all. Dreamy bumps his head and wakes up to discover it was just a dream, yet finds a jewel in his cap, just like the ones the pokies mine for a living.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel wants to create a monster. A horrible, gigantic creature, an awesome being that is going to destroy all the Smurfs! But Gargamel makes a slight mistake, and the result is going to astonish him and his cat Azrael.

programme.title: The Gargoyle Of Quarrel Castle
programme.desc: In Quarrel Castle, you almost never hear a kind word. Both Selwyn the Warlock and Tallulah, his witch-mate, spend their time quarrelling. Tharp, their pet gargoyle, takes refuge in the Village of Smurfs. But something terrible is going to happen....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Accidents do happen. This time it is Jokey Smurf's mistake that ends up with his shadow coming to independent life! And the shadow loves to play practical jokes on the whole population of the Village of the Smurfs...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel has thrown in his slime pond so much poisonous muck that the water becomes enchanted and Gargamel, after falling in, suddenly finds himself much smaller that he would wish. Actually he is going to be so small that Papa Smurf will save him!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: It must be a coincidence: just as an elephant crosses the forest and meets baby Smurf, the Smurfs decide to create a big Smurf Circus. They are going to meet the infernal sorcerer Balthazar and Baby Smurf will have a lot of fun...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel once again meets Esmeralda, the gypsy fortune-teller, and she finds a novel way of getting the gold coin that Gargamel imprudently shows her. But the Smurfs in their turn are tricked into believing there is such a thing as a good-luck tree...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: The Little Orange Horse With Gold Shoes
programme.desc: Sliding down a rainbow, a little winged horse loses a golden shoe. He meets the Smurfette and she helps him look for his lost horseshoe. They fall in love somehow, for who could be unmoved by the charm of a little orange horse... Or of a Smurfette?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: There is an evil power in the Titan's crown that Miner Smurf finds underground. And Greedy Smurf is the Smurf to fall victim to it. Then Gargamel comes up with some new schemes to destroy the Smurfs, and everything gets hopelessly tangled.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Papa Smurf's worries make him break into a rash of worrywarts. The only way to relieve him of his bout of indecision-inducing disease is to have him rub the horn of a Wartmonger, a sloppy, slimy, stupid and brutal enemy of the Pussywillow Pixies...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Poor Lazy! All he wants is a good night's rest. But no, all the Smurfs throw a party for him and, what's more, he gets dragged into a silly argument about painting giant Bigmouth's toes a bright tangerine red... It's a long, sleepless night for poor Lazy Smurf!

programme.title: Smurf Box Derby
programme.desc: Handy Smurf makes another invention: the Smurfmobile. Each Smurf has his – or her – customized vehicle and all, or almost all, the Smurfs enjoy a little spin... But then the evil wizard Gargamel gets hold of the idea and starts making trouble for the Smurfs...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: This time, Gargamel's sinister plan works too well. He just wanted a slight flood to drown the Smurfs. But this is almost the end of the world, and the Smurfs have to build an ark to survive... Will Smurfette's friend, the little winged horse, arrive on time?

programme.title: Babes In Wartland
programme.desc: Baby Smurf, playing hide-and-seek, hides in a basket that gets thrown in the river... Baby Smurf floats to the land of the Pussywillow Pixies... But the nasty, stupid Wartmonger reacts strangely to Baby...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The latest invention of both Greedy and Handy Smurf: a soft, refreshing delicacy that they call Smurf cream but that we humans know as ice cream. All would be well if rivalry did not come between the two Smurfs... And if Gargamel did not do his best to be unpleasant!

programme.title: The Bad Place
programme.desc: What is this little moon coming from above? Why, it's a crater-pockmarked globe of mud inhabited by the Grimeys, a family of mud-splattering, mud-eating creatures from out there in the sky. Not all the Smurfs are enthusiastic about the visitors....

programme.title: Beauty Is Only Smurf Deep
programme.desc: Periwinkle, a vain Pixie, is upset when her magic mirror tells her that Vanity is the fairest, not she. Periwinkle kidnaps Vanity, but the rest of the Smurfs come to Vanity's rescue. Periwinkle sees the error of her ways and they become friends.

programme.title: The Smurfomatic Smurfolator
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel still wants to destroy the Smurfs. This time, he sends on the forest the seeds of a creeping weed that is sure to entangle all the Smurfs... But Handy Smurf has devised a smurfomatic smurfolator...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Plotting to rid himself of the Smurfs, Gargamel casts a spell over Bigmouth and disguises himself as a Smurf. Thinking he is a Smurf, Bigmouth nearly succeeds in wrecking everything in the Village of the Smurfs until Papa Smurf comes up with a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfiest Of Friends
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf had one friend: Clumsy Smurf. But poor Clumsy is so, well, clumsy, that Brainy refuses to see him again. So now he is left without anyone willing to listen to him. Maybe Buddy, the good-looking imp met by chance near the Great Oak can be a pal for Brainy....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When Gargamel is able to make a flying carpet out of a patchwork quilt, accidents are bound to happen...The result of one accident is that a piece of the flying bedspread is used as Baby Smurf's diaper, with very surprising results...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: How do you bring a baby triceratops back to his mama and papa? The Smurfs are doing their best, dodging dinosaurs and mysterious beings that live in prehistoric caves...

programme.title: Heavenly Smurfs
programme.desc: Once again, Gargamel's infallible plan to catch the Smurfs has been foiled. But the Smurfs play a trick on him: disguised as tiny blue angels, they will teach him to mend his ways...

programme.title: The Smurfs' Firebrigade
programme.desc: The Smurf village institutes a fire brigade to battle the flames in Greedy's kitchen only to discover that Gargamel has taken all of their water. Not realizing the weakness of his dam, Gargamel and Azrael are washed away when it breaks and floods the Smurf village, extinguishing the fire.

programme.title: A Gift For Papa's Day
programme.desc: Gargamel steals Papa Smurf's birthday hat to lure the Smurfs into a trap. Papa tricks Gargamel into releasing them and then keeps the unusual hat to remind everyone of their great escape.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The boy from the wood and Laconia, the deaf-mute elf, ask Papa Smurf to celebrate their wedding. The Smurfs are getting the party ready, following the advice of the Smurfette, when Gargamel comes to put a spoke in their wheel.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Guess who's coming back to the Village of the Smurfs? Grandpa Smurf himself, who's been away for some five hundred years. He returns with grave news: the Smurfs will have to find the four magical elements to make the long life Stone, or their very existence is going to be in jeopardy. Can they do it in just one day?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Thinking a treasure is to be found, Gargamel follows the Smurfs every step: into Jack Frost's cave, then to the desert in search of the Pyramid of Zenobia, and in the West Wind's lair... The Smurfs must find the four elements of the long life Stone before sundown. But can it be done? Can the Smurfs preserve their very existence?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: While the Smurfs left at the Village try to find Grandpa Smurf's box and survive a flood caused by a geyser, Grandpa himself, Papa Smurf, Sassette and a few Smurfs more try to secure the last missing element from a volcano guarded by the terrifying wooden Tikis... and Gargamel, with Azrael as usual, do their best to foul things up for the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: As if Gargamel didn't have enough troubles as it is. Now he is saddled with a new problem, a problem by the name of Scruple, a new apprentice. A lazy, insolent, good-for-nothing character who will help in getting hold of the enchanted quill, a magic pen that writes nothing but the truth... and is going, or so Gargamel hopes, to aid in catching the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Snappy doesn't always do as he is told. For instance, he is a little careless in putting out the campfire where the Smurfs have been roasting marshmallows. Even though the Smurfs are doing the impossible in trying to save the forest from the holocaust, the situation looks bleak. Snappy is hunted by remorse. And he would be even more so if he knew what the evil Gargamel is up to.

programme.title: Smurfing In Sign Language
programme.desc: The Smurfs meet a woodland elf, who teaches them sign language after Gargamel inflicts a no-speaking potion on them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Thinking Baby Smurf is a leprechaun, two poachers kidnap him and try to get the small one to tell them where his pot of gold is hidden. Papa Smurf organizes everyone to attack the villains with Smurfberry pies so Baby can escape.

programme.title: The Littlest Witch
programme.desc: On an errand to Witch Haven for Papa Smurf, the little blue creatures meet a tiny witch and teach her how to be good while at the same time cause another witch to lose her wicked powers for one year after she falls into the river.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: In the distant valley of Nodrog, the Smurfs meet the Molians who try to dissuade them from obtaining the magical Smurf-stone that Papa Smurf needs to cure his gout.

programme.title: Smurfy Acres
programme.desc: The Smurfs learn there's no place like home when Gargamel gets the Book of Spells to conjure up a new and more beautiful place for the Smurfs to live; a place that is very convenient for him to lay a trap for them!

programme.title: Wedding Bells For Gargamel
programme.desc: The Smurfs befriend a maiden in distress who is betrothed to Gargamel by convincing her father that the foolish wizard is insane.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs help a fairy queen outwit the evil fairy Fallon who tries to take away her son's magic rattle.

programme.title: All Creatures Great And Smurf
programme.desc: Nat Smurf is convinced he can help all creatures with his healing ways, even the wicked Azrael after he gets his paw caught in a trap. He heals well, but even though he is tempted to stay with the Smurfs, he runs back to Gargamel while leading his old master away from Smurf Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: The Smurf Who Would Be King
programme.desc: Dreamy yearns to be King after reading a story about them. He falls through a whirlpool while on his ship and finds himself in the land of pokies who think Dreamy is their long-lost King. When he confronts the pokies' enemies, the Norfnags, he finds they aren't fearful at all. Dreamy bumps his head and wakes up to discover it was just a dream, yet finds a jewel in his cap, just like the ones the pokies mine for a living.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel wants to create a monster. A horrible, gigantic creature, an awesome being that is going to destroy all the Smurfs! But Gargamel makes a slight mistake, and the result is going to astonish him and his cat Azrael.

programme.title: The Gargoyle Of Quarrel Castle
programme.desc: In Quarrel Castle, you almost never hear a kind word. Both Selwyn the Warlock and Tallulah, his witch-mate, spend their time quarrelling. Tharp, their pet gargoyle, takes refuge in the Village of Smurfs. But something terrible is going to happen....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Accidents do happen. This time it is Jokey Smurf's mistake that ends up with his shadow coming to independent life! And the shadow loves to play practical jokes on the whole population of the Village of the Smurfs...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel has thrown in his slime pond so much poisonous muck that the water becomes enchanted and Gargamel, after falling in, suddenly finds himself much smaller that he would wish. Actually he is going to be so small that Papa Smurf will save him!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: It must be a coincidence: just as an elephant crosses the forest and meets baby Smurf, the Smurfs decide to create a big Smurf Circus. They are going to meet the infernal sorcerer Balthazar and Baby Smurf will have a lot of fun...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel once again meets Esmeralda, the gypsy fortune-teller, and she finds a novel way of getting the gold coin that Gargamel imprudently shows her. But the Smurfs in their turn are tricked into believing there is such a thing as a good-luck tree...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: The Little Orange Horse With Gold Shoes
programme.desc: Sliding down a rainbow, a little winged horse loses a golden shoe. He meets the Smurfette and she helps him look for his lost horseshoe. They fall in love somehow, for who could be unmoved by the charm of a little orange horse... Or of a Smurfette?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: There is an evil power in the Titan's crown that Miner Smurf finds underground. And Greedy Smurf is the Smurf to fall victim to it. Then Gargamel comes up with some new schemes to destroy the Smurfs, and everything gets hopelessly tangled.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Papa Smurf's worries make him break into a rash of worrywarts. The only way to relieve him of his bout of indecision-inducing disease is to have him rub the horn of a Wartmonger, a sloppy, slimy, stupid and brutal enemy of the Pussywillow Pixies...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Poor Lazy! All he wants is a good night's rest. But no, all the Smurfs throw a party for him and, what's more, he gets dragged into a silly argument about painting giant Bigmouth's toes a bright tangerine red... It's a long, sleepless night for poor Lazy Smurf!

programme.title: Smurf Box Derby
programme.desc: Handy Smurf makes another invention: the Smurfmobile. Each Smurf has his – or her – customized vehicle and all, or almost all, the Smurfs enjoy a little spin... But then the evil wizard Gargamel gets hold of the idea and starts making trouble for the Smurfs...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: This time, Gargamel's sinister plan works too well. He just wanted a slight flood to drown the Smurfs. But this is almost the end of the world, and the Smurfs have to build an ark to survive... Will Smurfette's friend, the little winged horse, arrive on time?

programme.title: Babes In Wartland
programme.desc: Baby Smurf, playing hide-and-seek, hides in a basket that gets thrown in the river... Baby Smurf floats to the land of the Pussywillow Pixies... But the nasty, stupid Wartmonger reacts strangely to Baby...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The latest invention of both Greedy and Handy Smurf: a soft, refreshing delicacy that they call Smurf cream but that we humans know as ice cream. All would be well if rivalry did not come between the two Smurfs... And if Gargamel did not do his best to be unpleasant!

programme.title: The Bad Place
programme.desc: What is this little moon coming from above? Why, it's a crater-pockmarked globe of mud inhabited by the Grimeys, a family of mud-splattering, mud-eating creatures from out there in the sky. Not all the Smurfs are enthusiastic about the visitors....

programme.title: Beauty Is Only Smurf Deep
programme.desc: Periwinkle, a vain Pixie, is upset when her magic mirror tells her that Vanity is the fairest, not she. Periwinkle kidnaps Vanity, but the rest of the Smurfs come to Vanity's rescue. Periwinkle sees the error of her ways and they become friends.

programme.title: The Smurfomatic Smurfolator
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel still wants to destroy the Smurfs. This time, he sends on the forest the seeds of a creeping weed that is sure to entangle all the Smurfs... But Handy Smurf has devised a smurfomatic smurfolator...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Plotting to rid himself of the Smurfs, Gargamel casts a spell over Bigmouth and disguises himself as a Smurf. Thinking he is a Smurf, Bigmouth nearly succeeds in wrecking everything in the Village of the Smurfs until Papa Smurf comes up with a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfiest Of Friends
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf had one friend: Clumsy Smurf. But poor Clumsy is so, well, clumsy, that Brainy refuses to see him again. So now he is left without anyone willing to listen to him. Maybe Buddy, the good-looking imp met by chance near the Great Oak can be a pal for Brainy....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When Gargamel is able to make a flying carpet out of a patchwork quilt, accidents are bound to happen...The result of one accident is that a piece of the flying bedspread is used as Baby Smurf's diaper, with very surprising results...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: How do you bring a baby triceratops back to his mama and papa? The Smurfs are doing their best, dodging dinosaurs and mysterious beings that live in prehistoric caves...

programme.title: Heavenly Smurfs
programme.desc: Once again, Gargamel's infallible plan to catch the Smurfs has been foiled. But the Smurfs play a trick on him: disguised as tiny blue angels, they will teach him to mend his ways...

programme.title: The Smurfs' Firebrigade
programme.desc: The Smurf village institutes a fire brigade to battle the flames in Greedy's kitchen only to discover that Gargamel has taken all of their water. Not realizing the weakness of his dam, Gargamel and Azrael are washed away when it breaks and floods the Smurf village, extinguishing the fire.

programme.title: A Gift For Papa's Day
programme.desc: Gargamel steals Papa Smurf's birthday hat to lure the Smurfs into a trap. Papa tricks Gargamel into releasing them and then keeps the unusual hat to remind everyone of their great escape.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The boy from the wood and Laconia, the deaf-mute elf, ask Papa Smurf to celebrate their wedding. The Smurfs are getting the party ready, following the advice of the Smurfette, when Gargamel comes to put a spoke in their wheel.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Guess who's coming back to the Village of the Smurfs? Grandpa Smurf himself, who's been away for some five hundred years. He returns with grave news: the Smurfs will have to find the four magical elements to make the long life Stone, or their very existence is going to be in jeopardy. Can they do it in just one day?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Thinking a treasure is to be found, Gargamel follows the Smurfs every step: into Jack Frost's cave, then to the desert in search of the Pyramid of Zenobia, and in the West Wind's lair... The Smurfs must find the four elements of the long life Stone before sundown. But can it be done? Can the Smurfs preserve their very existence?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: While the Smurfs left at the Village try to find Grandpa Smurf's box and survive a flood caused by a geyser, Grandpa himself, Papa Smurf, Sassette and a few Smurfs more try to secure the last missing element from a volcano guarded by the terrifying wooden Tikis... and Gargamel, with Azrael as usual, do their best to foul things up for the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: As if Gargamel didn't have enough troubles as it is. Now he is saddled with a new problem, a problem by the name of Scruple, a new apprentice. A lazy, insolent, good-for-nothing character who will help in getting hold of the enchanted quill, a magic pen that writes nothing but the truth... and is going, or so Gargamel hopes, to aid in catching the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Snappy doesn't always do as he is told. For instance, he is a little careless in putting out the campfire where the Smurfs have been roasting marshmallows. Even though the Smurfs are doing the impossible in trying to save the forest from the holocaust, the situation looks bleak. Snappy is hunted by remorse. And he would be even more so if he knew what the evil Gargamel is up to.

programme.title: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel is able to capture the Smurfette. Now he is going to give her a truth serum and know all of Papa Smurf' secrets... But then Gargamel makes a big mistake and gives the Smurfette a fib formula!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Grouchy, the Smurf who hates everything, doubly hates his own birthday party and goes to hide in Shadow Swamp... He is going to meet strange beings and stranger adventures while the other Smurfs search for him...

programme.title: Smurfiplication
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel creates a magic formula that duplicates everything it touches. And surprise! Suddenly there are six Brainy Smurf! This creates a few interesting situations in the Village... And also at Gargamel's!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Todos sabemos que Pitufo Grunon odia varias cosas. Pero la cosa que odia mas que nada es el agua, cuando hay suficiente para que se pueda ahogar. Pitufo Grunon no sabe nadar. Y cuando los Pitufos notan esto y le tratan de ensenar como sobrevivir en el agua, el malvado mago Gargamel hace que todo sea un poco mas peligroso de lo que deberia ser...

programme.title: No Puedo Pitufar La Musica
programme.desc: No hay nada que la hechicera Clorhidris odie tanto como el amor en el mundo. Le gustaria que el amor desapareciera de la faz de la tierra y, para conseguirlo, ha decidido comenzar por la musica. Lanza un hechizo a un cuerno magico que absorbera la melodia de las canciones... en especial, de las canciones de los Pitufos. Con la ayuda de su amiga Laconia, es posible que los Pitufos consigan echar por tierra el malvado plan de Clorhidris...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La encantadora Allura posee una esfera magica muy especial cuya energia, segun ella misma dice, puede levantar el animo e inspirar a aquellos faltos de inspiracion. Todo lo que hay que hacer es sostener la esfera con las manos... Es cierto que la esfera fomenta la inspiracion, pero solo hasta cierto punto. Sin embargo, sus efectos secundarios pueden ser muy peligrosos, tal como descubren los Pitufos cuando se hacen adictos a la esfera...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos descubren el espiritu deportivo, la alegria y la amista cuando llevan a cabo sus primeros "Juegos Pitufos". Los Pitufos deciden ponerse en forma tras casi perder contra el gato Azrael.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos descubren una Fuente de la Juventud cuidada por un espantoso Troll que roba el libro magico de Papa Pitufo.

programme.title: La Abominable Bestia De La Nieve
programme.desc: Pitufo Filosofo y sus amigos organizan una jornada en la Montana de Hielo para buscar la rara flor de la nieve para Papa Pitufo. Encuentran una terrorifica bestia de la nieve, pero acaban siendo amigos gracias a la amabilidad de Pitufina, y les ayuda a encontrar la minuscula flor.

programme.title: El Pitufo De Troya
programme.desc: Gargamel, el malvado mago, ha ideado un nuevo plan para capturar a los Pitufos: ha construido una estatua gigante con la forma de Papa Pitufo. Espera que, al verla, los Pitufos lleven la estatua a su aldea.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: En un esfuerzo por conseguir que Papa Pitufo tenga algo de tranquilidad, Pitufo Filosofo usa uno de los hechizos de Papa Pitufo para crear una barrera de sonido magica alrededor de la aldea. Papa Pitufo no es capaz de deshacer el hechizo y envia a los Pitufitos, que han quedado atrapados fuera de la aldea, a un hacedor de ruidos. Bebe Pitufo se lleva una botella de ruido de casa del hacedor de ruidos, y asi consiguen romper la barrera.

programme.title: La Carrera De Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Carpintero ha ideado un nuevo invento: el pitufimovil. Todos los Pitufos tienen su propio vehiculo personalizado y todos (o casi todos) disfrutan dando una vuelta en ellos. Sin embargo, el malvado mago Gargamel se aprovecha de la idea y empieza a causar problemas a los Pitufos...

programme.title: Los Visitantes
programme.desc: ¿Que es esa pequena luna que ha llegado del cielo? Es un globo de barro cubierto de crateres y habitado por los Lodosos, una familia de criaturas que vienen del cielo y comen y salpican barro. No todos los Pitufos demuestran entusiasmo por los visitantes...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Gargamel y Baltasar se ponen a los mandos de un Robotin gigante para obligar al rey Gerard a que les entregue a Pitufo Robotin. Cuando el Robotin esta a punto de destruir el castillo, Giganton, el nuevo, enorme y extrano amigo de Pitufo Robotin, vence al Robotin. Pitufo Robotin sufre danos durante la batalla, pero Pitufo Carpintero lo arregla y le implanta una caja de voz que le permite decir «¡Hola!».

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Armonia ya no es bienvenido en el coro de los Pitufos: canta de una manera demasiado desafinada. Sin embargo, Papa Pitufo le entrega un amuleto que le convertira en un virtuoso del canto. Y, por si fuera poco, aqui llega Hogata...

programme.title: Aquel Que Pitufa El Ultimo...
programme.desc: Pitufo Bromista se pasa de la raya con sus bromas cuando Clorhidris cae victima de una de ellas. Para vengarse de los Pitufos, crea un hechizo para robar su sentido del humor. Pitufo Grunon, que ya de por si no tenia sentido del humor, se hace con la pocion de humor y rompe el hechizo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Natural y Travieso roban la formula de Gargamel para hacer otro Pitufo - otra pitufa para acompanar a Pitufina. Asi pues, crean a Sassette, que crea problemas por doquier. Haciendo uso de su pocion, Papa Pitufo convierte la malvada creacion de Gargamel en una simpatica Sassette.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Las pinturas del malvado Maestro son capaces de tele portar a sus modelos dentro del cuadro...para siempre! Papa pitufo le dice a Pintor que cambie las pinturas y en poco tiempo Maestro acaba dentro de uno de sus cuadros, al lado de su modelo de ensueno: Pitufina.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Hay algun tipo de poder maligno en la corona del Titan que Minero encuentra bajo tierra, y Avaricioso acaba sucumbiendo a el. Cuando Gargamel aparece con una de sus fechorias en mente, todo se acaba enrevesandose.

programme.title: Ya Pitufaron Al Cachorro
programme.desc: Los Pitufos estan tan absortos con el nuevo juguete de Pitufo Carpintero que se olvidan de dar de comer a Puppy. Gargamel atrae a Puppy hacia una jaula con comida y le mantiene cautivo para pedir un rescate: los secretos magicos de los Pitufos. Los Pitufitos distraen a Gargamel con el juguete durante el tiempo necesario para rescatar a Puppy, y prometen no volver a dejarlo desatendido.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Las preocupaciones de Papa Pitufo hacen que le salgan verrugas. La unica forma de librarle de esta enfermedad causada por la indecision es que frote el cuerno de uno de los Verrugosos, los desalinados, viscosos, estupidos y brutales enemigos de las haditas del Bosque de los Sauces...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: Una Choza No Es Un Hogar
programme.desc: Gargamel desea tener una choza mas grande, y recurre al Gran libro de hechizos para conjurar un nuevo hogar. Sin embargo, todos sus hechizos le salen del reves y esto le convence de que no hay ningun sitio como el hogar.

programme.title: El Libro De Bromas De Bromista
programme.desc: Las cajas sorpresa de Pitufo Bromista ya no resultan divertidas para los demas Pitufos. Pitufo Bromista busca nuevas ideas en su «Gran libro de las bromas», pero esas ideas son aun peor recibidas en la aldea. Y entonces, Gargamel llega con algunas bromas de su propia cosecha...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Gargamel inventa la leyenda del Pitufo Hechicero para enganar a Papa Pitufo y sus amigos Pitufos y conducirlos hacia una trampa en lo alto de la montana. Papa Pitufo, con su ingenio, engana al mago con algo de sus propia magia y Gargamel es perseguido montana abajo y devuelto de nuevo a su castillo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Un terrible gigante ayuda a Gargamel a capturar a los Pitufos para hacer una rica sopa, pero tendra que enfrentar a Papa Pitufo primero.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado hechicero Gargamel acude una vez mas a Esmeralda, la adivinadora, la cual se las ingenia para hacerse con el dinero de Gargamel. Cuando es el turno de los Pitufos, les hace creer que existe un arbol de la suerte...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando el hada de las flores aparece en el pueblo de los Pitufos, todos se enamoran de su encanto e inteligencia. Y pronto se daran cuenta de que se convertira en una especie de mama pitufo para todos...

programme.title: Pitufos Y Solo Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado mago Gargamel ha conseguido capturar a Pitufina. Ahora, se dispone a administrarle un suero de la verdad para descubrir todos los secretos de Papa Pitufo... pero Gargamel comete un gran error y le da a Pitufina una formula de las mentiras.

programme.title: El Pitufo Galante
programme.desc: La reina Agripina no dejara que su hijo, el principe Godofredo, se case con la dulce Priscila. Ella quiere como nuera a una chica que sea capaz de mostrarle algo que nunca antes haya visto. Cuando Hogata se entera y descubre la existencia de Abuelo Pitufo, esta segura de que lograra sorprender a la reina con su captura. Por supuesto, Hogata debe atrapar primero a Abuelo Pitufo...

programme.title: Dilo Por Ti Mismo, Granjero
programme.desc: Pitufo Labrador esconde su amor por Pitufina ocultandose en el anonimato y enviandole poemas. Cuando finalmente se encuentran, Giganton les captura y, en sus esfuerzos por escapar, descubren su afecto mutuo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Filosofo y Bebe Pitufo mezclan las formulas de Papa Pitufo con consecuencias desastrosas, dejandoles a merced de un ejercito de hambrientas langostas que Gargamel ha soltado en el bosque.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La nota que Papa Pitufo escribio avisando a los demas Pitufos para que vean un cometa esta rota. Al ser solo capaces de leer una parte, los Pitufos creen que es el fin del mundo. Todos planean como sera su ultimo dia, hasta que papa Pitufo regresa y clarifica el lio.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cada vez que Pitufo Perezoso se queda dormido, tiene la misma pesadilla una y otra vez: se encuentra en poder de Morfeo, un malvado hechicero que quiere capturar a tantas almas dormidas como sea posible. Uno tras otro, todos los Pitufos van cayendo en las garras de Morfeo. ¿Todos? Quiza no, si Papa Pitufo puede evitarlo. Para ello, Papa Pitufo acude al Arenero en busca de ayuda...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando se produce una emergencia, todos los Pitufos de la aldea dejan lo que tienen entre manos y corren a oir las noticias. Pero que Pitufo Vanidoso convoque una asamblea para que los Pitufos puedan admirar su nuevo gorro es pasarse de la raya. Le echan de la aldea y Pitufo Vanidoso tiene la mala suerte de encontrarse con Lofty, el elfo, que le recomienda darse un horrible bano de fango...

programme.title: Los Pitufos Y El Arbol Del Dinero
programme.desc: El mago malvado Gargamel ha elaborado otro plan diabolico con la ayuda de su madre, quien no es mas agradable que el. El quiere persuadir a los Pitufos con dinero pero ellos no saben lo que les espera. ¿Pitufo Goloso caera en la trampa?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado mago Gargamel quiere crear un monstruo. Una criatura horrible y gigantesca, ¡un ser imponente que destruya a todos los Pitufos! Pero Gargamel comete un pequeno error y el resultado les dejara asombrados a su gato Azrael y a el.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La malvada bruja se transforma en Pitufo para vengarse de ellos por destruir su amuleto magico.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La nueva obra de Pitufo Poeta va a ser su mayor creacion de todos los tiempos, y contara con Pitufina, la preferida de todos, como actriz principal. Los demas Pitufos compiten por el honor de actuar junto a Pitufina. Incluso Pitufo Timido, que es muy discreto y retraido, es uno de los candidatos al papel. Pero Pitufo Filosofo, que se ha autodesignado director de la obra, no lo ve de la misma manera...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: El Pitufo Que Queria Ser Rey
programme.desc: Pitufo Sonador anhela convertirse en rey despues de leer una historia sobre reyes. Mientras esta en su barco, cae a traves de un remolino y llega a una tierra de pequenos seres que creen que Pitufo Sonador es su rey, desaparecido hace mucho tiempo. Cuando se enfrenta a los Norfnangs, los enemigos de esos pequenos seres, descubre que no son terrorificos en absoluto. Pitufo Sonador se da un golpe en la cabeza y descubre al despertar que todo habia sido un sueno, aunque encuentra en su gorro una joya identica a las que extraian esos pequenos seres de su mina.

programme.title: El Amo Escrupulo
programme.desc: Pitufo Labrador es el reticente amo de un genio llamado Gourdy, cuyo entusiasmo por ser servicial es quiza algo excesivo. Tras un nuevo incidente provocado por el exceso de celo de Gourdy, Pitufo Labrador le dice algo que no deberia haber dicho y Gourdy desaparece. ¿Y a que no adivinas quien lo encuentra? En efecto: Escrupuloso, el aprendiz del malvado mago Gargamel. ¿Y quien podria arrebatar a Gourdy de las manos de Escrupuloso, sino el propio Gargamel?

programme.title: ¡alarma, Pitufos!
programme.desc: Los Pitufitos se sienten poco queridos y deciden huir. Se llevan consigo objetos que les recuerden su hogar, lo que hace que los Pitufos crean que hay un ladron entre ellos. Pitufo Filosofo intenta atrapar al ladron instalando pitufialarmas. Las alarmas provocan un estruendo que atrae a los Pitufitos de vuelta a casa, donde Papa Pitufo les convence de que los quieren.

programme.title: Pituplicacion
programme.desc: El malvado mago Gargamel crea una formula magica que duplica todo aquello que toca. Y...¡sorpresa! ¡Ahora hay seis Pitufos Filosofos! Esto provoca algunas situaciones interesantes en la aldea... ¡Y tambien en casa de Gargamel!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Fortachon descubre a un caballero que lo ayuda a combatir a un Dragon, pero este huye y deja a Fortachon defendiendo a los Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Un terrible gigante ayuda a Gargamel a capturar a los Pitufos para hacer una rica sopa, pero tendra que enfrentar a Papa Pitufo primero.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Gargamel ha echado tantas sustancias toxicas en su estanque que el agua se vuelve encantada. Tras caerse en el estanque, Gargamel se vuelve pequeno, tan pequeno que Papa Pitufo tendra que salvarlo.

programme.title: El Capricho De Travieso
programme.desc: ¿Sabias que, si atrapas un trol, este puede concederte un deseo? Resulta que Aloysius el trol ha quedado atrapado en una de las pitufitrampas de Gargamel. Pitufo Colerico le libera y, como recompensa, consigue que los demas Pitufos satisfagan todos sus caprichos. Esto acarrea un monton de problemas para los Pitufos, ya que los Pitufitos, en ocasiones, piden cosas que no son buenas para ellos... ni tampoco para los demas.

programme.title: El Pitufo Osado
programme.desc: Esta vez, Gargamel tiene un plan infalible. Sin hacer caso de la risa burlona de Azrael, el malvado hechicero ha perfeccionado una sustancia magica a la que ha llamado «polvo temerario», que convertira a todos los Pitufos en temerarios e intrepidos aventureros. ¿Caera Papa Pitufo en la trampa de Gargamel? ¿Atrapara su enemigo a todos los Pitufos? ¿Tendra esta historia un final feliz?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Gargamel esta decidido a sobrevolar la Aldea Pitufa para atrapar a un Pitufo y llevarlo a la Convencion de los Magos, e invoca a su libro de hechizos para que le ayude. Esto da lugar a una serie de divertidos contratiempos con su maquina voladora, y Gargamel vuelve a convertirse en el hazme reir de la Convencion de los Magos.

programme.title: La Carrera De Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Carpintero ha ideado un nuevo invento: el pitufimovil. Todos los Pitufos tienen su propio vehiculo personalizado y todos (o casi todos) disfrutan dando una vuelta en ellos. Sin embargo, el malvado mago Gargamel se aprovecha de la idea y empieza a causar problemas a los Pitufos...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos hambrientos descubren una cueva en donde se encuentra oculta comida congelada custodiada por un trol tambien congelado quien fue encarcelado debido a su avaricia por un diamante magico. Mientras los Pitufos descongelan la cueva Gargamel roba la comida, pero el diamante magico lo transforma en una masa helada y el trol liberado ayuda gustosamente a los Pitufos a cargar la comida de regreso a su aldea.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La encantadora Allura posee una esfera magica muy especial cuya energia, segun ella misma dice, puede levantar el animo e inspirar a aquellos faltos de inspiracion. Todo lo que hay que hacer es sostener la esfera con las manos... Es cierto que la esfera fomenta la inspiracion, pero solo hasta cierto punto. Sin embargo, sus efectos secundarios pueden ser muy peligrosos, tal como descubren los Pitufos cuando se hacen adictos a la esfera...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Practico aprende que es mejor haber pitufado que no haber pitufado nunca cuando descubre que su amor verdadero es una sirena. ¿Podran vivir juntos para siempre?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El chico del bosque y Laconia, la elfa muda y sorda, preguntan a Papa Pitufo que celebre su boda. Mientras los Pitufos preparan la fiesta bajo las ordenes de Pitufina, Gargamel hace acto de presencia.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La vida en la Aldea Pitufa podria ser mas tranquila si Puppy se comportara un poco mejor. Sin embargo, el pequeno perro de los Pitufos se dedica a escarbar entre las flores de Pitufina, ensuciar el nuevo papel pintado de Pitufo Vanidoso y arruinar los experimentos de Papa Pitufo. Aun asi, Puppy va a ayudar a los Pitufos a escapar de una trampa que les ha tendido Gargamel. O quiza no tenga la disciplina necesaria para ello...

programme.title: A Todas Las Criaturas Grandes Y Pequenas
programme.desc: Pitufo Natural esta convencido de que puede ayudar a todas las criaturas con sus dones curativos, incluso al malvado Azrael, cuya pata queda atrapada en una trampa. El gato se cura y, a pesar de que tiene la tentacion de quedarse con los Pitufos, regresa con Gargamel, pero conduce a su dueno hacia un lugar alejado de la Aldea Pitufa.

programme.title: El Hombre De La Luna
programme.desc: Cansado y harto de que no le aprecien, el Hombre de la Luna deja su trabajo y se retira en la Tierra, en la Aldea Pitufa. La ausencia de la luna en cuarto creciente desata el caos en las costumbres de los Pitufos, y Madre Naturaleza y Padre Tiempo tambien se ven arrastrados por el embrollo...

programme.title: Fortachon Y Pitufina
programme.desc: Pitufo Fortachon descubre lo que es estar incapacitado cuando se rompe la pierna. Pitufo Carpintero crea para el una pitufisilla de ruedas, un invento que le proporcionara algo de movilidad a Pitufo Fortachon. Pero, de repente, el malvado mago Gargamel aparece en escena.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: La Primera Navidad De Bebe Pitufo
programme.desc: La ilusion de Navidad se ve frustrada cuando Chlorhydris hechiza a San Nicolas para que no pueda repartir felicidad en Navidad. Afortunadamente, Papa Pitufo y los demas pitufos consiguen romper el hechizo y devolver la Navidad a su bosque.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Simon se ha perdido en el bosque buscando a sus padres, una pareja de gigantes. Los Pitufos trataran de llevarlo de vuelta a su casa, pero gargamel aparecera una vez mas con no muy buenas intenciones.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La nota que Papa Pitufo escribio avisando a los demas Pitufos para que vean un cometa esta rota. Al ser solo capaces de leer una parte, los Pitufos creen que es el fin del mundo. Todos planean como sera su ultimo dia, hasta que papa Pitufo regresa y clarifica el lio.

programme.title: El Pitufo Reportero
programme.desc: Pitufo Curioso ha tenido una idea: ¿por que no imprimir un boletin con todas las noticias de la aldea? Esta seguro de que sus cotilleos sobre los Pitufos interesaran a todos los lectores. Pero las cosas no salen exactamente segun lo previsto cuando Papa Pitufo encuentra superpitufrutas.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado mago Gargamel vuelve a estar en problemas. Si no puede reunir una enorme cantidad de oro para el atardecer, le arrebataran todas sus posesiones. Sin embargo, los Pitufos van a ayudar a su archienemigo... hasta cierto punto.

programme.title: Hay Que Atrapar Al Ladron
programme.desc: Los Pitufos y Omnibus se hacen amigos de un desdichado joven cuyo maestro le obliga a robar. Pronto, el malvado ladron es entregado al magistrado y el joven esta encantado de irse a vivir con Omnibus.

programme.title: La Formula Aniquiladora
programme.desc: Existe una palabra magica aterradora. Cuando pronuncias esa palabra hacia algo o alguien, ¡haces que se desvanezca en la nada! ¿Podran los Pitufos anular su malvado poder antes de que Gargamel se apropie de ella?

programme.title: El Pitufo Galante
programme.desc: La reina Agripina no dejara que su hijo, el principe Godofredo, se case con la dulce Priscila. Ella quiere como nuera a una chica que sea capaz de mostrarle algo que nunca antes haya visto. Cuando Hogata se entera y descubre la existencia de Abuelo Pitufo, esta segura de que lograra sorprender a la reina con su captura. Por supuesto, Hogata debe atrapar primero a Abuelo Pitufo...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Miedoso entra corriendo en la aldea y grita que el cielo se esta cayendo. Justo en ese mismo momento, Papa Pitufo esta aquejado de un incontrolable ataque de estornudos...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Filosofo esta harto. Los Pitufitos y Sasita siguen inventandose historias sobre el con desagradables consecuencias. Por eso, prepara una formula magica, extraida del libro de hechizos de Papa Pitufo, que hace que los pequenos Pitufos crezcan y crezcan cada vez que dicen mentiras. Pero no habia contado con que ahora Gargamel tiene una forma de capturar a los Pitufitos.

programme.title: Ahora Los Pitufeas Y Ahora No
programme.desc: Los troles subterraneos capturan a los Pitufos para que sean sus esclavos. Papa Pitufo ingeniosamente los libera y luego destruye la bola de cristal magica que les concede el poder sobre los Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Practico aprende que es mejor haber pitufado que no haber pitufado nunca cuando descubre que su amor verdadero es una sirena. ¿Podran vivir juntos para siempre?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Un duende maligno le pone unos zapatos magicos a Pitufina, que no puede dejar de bailar, con la intencion de que le prometa que se casara con el. Todos sus pequenos amigos acuden a rescatarla y Papa Pitufo consigue ponerle los zapatos magicos al duende, obligandole a bailar hasta que se hace de noche.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Patoso y sus desventuras le llevan a traves de un rio a un lugar desconocido. Alli conoce a las duendecillas, unas adorables criaturitas cuyos enemigos acabaran encontrandose con los Pitufos.

programme.title: Pitufos Y Solo Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado mago Gargamel ha conseguido capturar a Pitufina. Ahora, se dispone a administrarle un suero de la verdad para descubrir todos los secretos de Papa Pitufo... pero Gargamel comete un gran error y le da a Pitufina una formula de las mentiras.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: En un esfuerzo por conseguir que Papa Pitufo tenga algo de tranquilidad, Pitufo Filosofo usa uno de los hechizos de Papa Pitufo para crear una barrera de sonido magica alrededor de la aldea. Papa Pitufo no es capaz de deshacer el hechizo y envia a los Pitufitos, que han quedado atrapados fuera de la aldea, a un hacedor de ruidos. Bebe Pitufo se lleva una botella de ruido de casa del hacedor de ruidos, y asi consiguen romper la barrera.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos hambrientos descubren una cueva en donde se encuentra oculta comida congelada custodiada por un trol tambien congelado quien fue encarcelado debido a su avaricia por un diamante magico. Mientras los Pitufos descongelan la cueva Gargamel roba la comida, pero el diamante magico lo transforma en una masa helada y el trol liberado ayuda gustosamente a los Pitufos a cargar la comida de regreso a su aldea.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Todos los Pitufos quieren un poema escrito para cada uno de ellos. Pitufo Poeta se siente superado por la presion y decide huir en busca de inspiracion. El rey Fiera Bestia captura a Pitufo Poeta y lo obliga a escribir un poema para animar a su hija. Pitufo Poeta descubre que la motivacion debe nacer del corazon, y nunca de la obligacion.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: La Mejor Memoria De La Aldea
programme.desc: A consecuencia de un loco experimento, Pitufo Torpe puede ahora almacenar interminables conocimientos en su memoria. Gargamel lo captura e intenta que le revele la formula de invisibilidad de Papa Pitufo, pero, en el ultimo segundo, Pitufo Torpe le engana diciendole unos ingredientes erroneos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Te despiertas temprano por la manana, antes de que los demas Pitufos se hayan levantado de sus camas, para preparar sabrosos bizcochos de pitufrutas. Dedicas toda la manana a preparar pitufimanjares para el almuerzo. Despues, toda la tarde a tener la deliciosa cena lista a tiempo. ¿Y acaso los demas Pitufos te dan siquiera las gracias? Asi pues, Pitufo Goloso renuncia. La aldea esta en problemas... y pronto, tambien lo esta Pitufo Goloso.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Genio inventa a Pituforobotin para que ayude a todos los Pitufos en sus labores, pero Filosofo lo reprograma para que abandone la Aldea Pitufo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Papa Pitufo organiza un grupo para navegar a una lejana isla ya que Gargamel ha cortado todos los arboles menos uno para atrapar a los pitufos. Gargamel les sigue pero la Bruja de la isla acaba enviando sus gaviotas tras el.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: No todos los dias se encuentra uno con una flor parlante. Y, en especial, con un personaje como Petaluma, una planta bulbosa algo arrogante con la que Pitufina se encuentra en el bosque. Por supuesto, Pitufina se muestra encantada y lleva a Petaluma con ella a la Aldea Pitufa... desencadenando un proceso que pondra en peligro a todos los Pitufos. Parece que las flores estan hechas para contemplarlas y no para escucharlas.

programme.title: Llamen Al Doctor Pitufo
programme.desc: Tal como su propio nombre indica, Pitufo Aficionado es incapaz de concentrarse en una actividad concreta. Pasa de una cosa a otra con tremenda facilidad y nunca termina lo que empieza. Pero, de repente, descubre que le apasiona la profesion medica. Pitufo Aficionado quiere convertirse en doctor y todos los Pitufos, con Papa Pitufo a la cabeza, van a ayudarle a cumplir su deseo.

programme.title: El Amigo Mas Pitufo
programme.desc: Pitufo Filosofo tenia un amigo: Pitufo Torpe. Pero el pobre Pitufo Torpe es tan... bueno, torpe, que Pitufo Filosofo no quiere volverle a ver. Asi que ahora no queda nadie dispuesto a escucharle. Quiza Buddy, el apuesto diablillo que ha conocido por casualidad cerca del gran roble, pueda convertirse en amigo de Pitufo Filosofo...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! Follows the adventures of high school student Yugi, who has a magical secret that comes to life when he plays his favorite card game: 'Duel Monsters.'

programme.title: Roblox DOORS with Thinknoodles!
programme.desc: Thinknoodles plays Roblox Doors horror game in ROBLOX!

programme.title: Super Mario RPG
programme.desc: Enter a world of whimsy with Mario on a quest to repair Star Road and defeat the troublemaking Smithy Gang, who has crashed into their world and scattered the 7 Star Pieces of Star Road. Abdallah plays as Mario and teams up with a party of unlikely allies, like the monstrous Bowser and a mysterious doll named Geno, in Super Mario RPG on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Sonic X
programme.desc: A slight malfunction causes Chaos Control, and sends Sonic the Hedgehog to Earth. While there, Sonic meets Chris Thorndyke, who helps in collecting the Chaos Emeralds, so Sonic and friends can go home.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros. Wonder
programme.desc: Mario and friends are invited to the Flower Kingdom by its ruler, Prince Florian, when Bowser suddenly appears, along with Kamek and Bowser Jr.! Bowser then takes hold of the Wonder Flower, merging himself, his Koopa Clown Car, and Prince Florian's castle to become a flying fortress, wreaking havoc across the land and trapping the Poplins in their homes. Abdallah plays as Mario and friends and sets off on a journey to defeat Bowser and save the Flower Kingdom in Super Mario Bros. Wonder on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Sonic Superstars
programme.desc: Adventure through the mystical Northstar Islands and harness all-new Emerald powers to move and attack in dynamic new ways. Navigate gorgeous, never-before-seen environments and stop Dr. Eggman, Fang, and a mysterious new adversary from converting the islands' giant animals into Badniks before it's too late! Watch as Abdallah plays as Sonic and friends in Sonic Superstars on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Princess Peach: Showtime!
programme.desc: Princess Peach sets off to save the Sparkle Theater from Grape and the Sour Bunch. The guardian fairy of the Sparkle Theater, Stella, assists Peach by giving her usage of Sparkle power and allowing her to transform. Abdallah plays as Princess Peach in Princess Peach: Showtime! on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Super Mario RPG
programme.desc: Enter a world of whimsy with Mario on a quest to repair Star Road and defeat the troublemaking Smithy Gang, who has crashed into their world and scattered the 7 Star Pieces of Star Road. Abdallah plays as Mario and teams up with a party of unlikely allies, like the monstrous Bowser and a mysterious doll named Geno, in Super Mario RPG on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Minecraft videos with JeromeASF
programme.desc: Welcome to my channel! I love playing Minecraft, Fortnite and a bunch of other games. My goal is to have as much fun as possible and provide entertaining videos for everyone! I hope you all enjoy!

Navigate gorgeous, never-before-seen environments and stop Dr. Eggman, Fang, and a mysterious new adversary from converting the islands' giant animals into Badniks before it's too late! Watch as Abdallah plays as Sonic and friends in Sonic Superstars on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Princess Peach: Showtime!
programme.desc: Princess Peach sets off to save the Sparkle Theater from Grape and the Sour Bunch. The guardian fairy of the Sparkle Theater, Stella, assists Peach by giving her usage of Sparkle power and allowing her to transform. Abdallah plays as Princess Peach in Princess Peach: Showtime! on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Super Mario RPG
programme.desc: Enter a world of whimsy with Mario on a quest to repair Star Road and defeat the troublemaking Smithy Gang, who has crashed into their world and scattered the 7 Star Pieces of Star Road. programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Sewing experts offer easy ways to create neat sewing projects right at home. Viewers of all skill levels learn tips and techniques for creating professional-looking garments, personalized apparel and home accents. Weekly episodes feature various themes, and feature two main projects and one shorter technique segment. Some projects include monogramming napkins and towels; baby poncho, hooded towel and baby-friendly diapers; embellishing yoga pants with a clothing tattoo; and sewing on knits.

programme.desc: Sink your teeth into current cake decorating trends! In the Man About Cake series, Joshua John Russell delivers incredible tips for creating modern edible masterpieces. programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: What to do with all that leftover garbage cake? Make these chocolate-dipped not-ice-cream-cone treats (a JJR original creation).

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Get scandalous with naked cakes. JJR bares it all and makes a rustic naked cake with flowers & a pop of pink buttercream filling.

programme.title: Anti-Valentine's Cake
programme.desc: JJR is celebrating Valentine's Day (a little) differently this year. If you're feeling anti-Valentine's yourself, get the recipes and everything you need to make this cake!

programme.title: Fitness
programme.desc: Discover how personal care is an essential part of your creative journey. Whether you're a seasoned crafter or a budding hobbyist, prioritize your well-being and find inspiration to fuel your passions.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: People come in all shapes and sizes. The first project uses papier mache and garden gloves to create cowboy and girl puppets. Next, decorate your own flip flops. Draw faces in your art journal without even lifting your pencil off the page. And finally, create clothespin action figures of all kinds from ninjas -- to fairies.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: We are on the move, with projects that go along with us, or move themselves! Join host Katie Hacker and make a rockin' roadster that really rolls. Artist Franz Spohn uses a little string to add animation to his art and blogger Jenny Barnett Rohrs make a wreath with colorful felt pinwheels. Use the Family Craft Box and recycled denim to make a car track. Decorate your room with an eye-catching string art project that uses color to create the feeling of movement.

programme.desc: What do you get when you combine a rainbow quilt, a star quilt and a medallion quilt all into one? A fresh episode of "The Midnight Quilt Show," of course! Join Angela as she breaks down Y-seams, quilting with templates and beyond.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: The holidays are coming, but don't stress! We teamed up with Angela Walters, host of the Midnight Quilt Show, to create three DIY quilt projects that are super gift-able. In this episode, you'll learn how to make a cathedral window pillow, an adorable gift for someone in your life who you've deemed "quilt-worthy." - P.S. Don't miss Angela's tips for non-quilters on what to do (and what NOT to do!) when you receive a gift from a quilter...

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela creates a modern Southwestern-style quilt that's the perfect size to use as a blanket for summer picnics in the park.
