programme.title: What If: Cosmos
programme.sub-title: Weird Human Tricks: From Invisibility to Stomach Gardens
programme.desc: Discover the strangest human abilities and experiments, from bending light for invisibility to hosting stomach gardens!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Not every team can claim a Grand Slam victory, but Team Liquid can! Join Nitr0, Elige, and NAF as they reflect on their journey to winning the Intel Grand Slam. They delve into the process behind winning each of the three required tournaments and share behind-the-scenes insights from their incredible run. This is a must-watch for any fan!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: MSI Split drawing 2024: We have to play them?!
programme.desc: Watch as Team Liquid League of Legends reacts to the 2024 MSI Draw, revealing their opponents and the impact on their tournament run. Then, relive their incredible journey to becoming LCS Spring Split Champions with behind-the-scenes footage of their final game preparations and triumphant finish.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Welcome to the World of Warcraft Arena World Championships! Watch Team Liquid's guild compete for victory as our casters break down key strategies and moments. Don’t miss this thrilling episode as they aim for the top!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Get to know Team Liquid: LoL Edition
programme.desc: Can Team Liquid’s manager Ben prove he knows Alphari and his players inside out? Find out as he answers questions about them. Next, watch Tactical and CoreJJ in thrilling 1v1s, and wrap up with a heartwarming "Draw My Life" for CoreJJ.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: World of Warcraft: Race for World's First
programme.desc: Race to the World First! Watch as 50 gamers compete for the world’s first achievement in World of Warcraft—a race requiring years of dedication, unlike a simple Counter-Strike match. Discover the deep connections and long-term rivalries among players. Then, switch gears to Dota 2 with our Fyrakk Heroic and Normal guide. This episode is a must-watch!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: "The race for World’s First heats up! Watch Team Liquid’s World of Warcraft guild take on the elusive Mythic Tindral Sageswift and other fierce bosses like Mythic Council of Dreams, Mythic Nymue, World’s First Mythic Smolderon, and Mythic Fyrakk. Will they rise to the challenge?"

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: How a role change can change the world!
programme.desc: Discover how a role change can transform your career! This episode explores CoreJJ’s journey from ADC to Support World Champion and his milestone achievement of finally beating Faker, one of the greatest League players ever. Witness CoreJJ’s remarkable evolution from his early days to becoming a top support player.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: HyperX Table Talk: The Struggles of North American LoL
programme.desc: On HyperX Table Talk, Bwipo and Broxah discuss North America's League of Legends scene and how the West stacks up globally. They explore what it would take for the West to win Worlds and delve into personal IRL topics to get to know the players better.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Not every team can claim a Grand Slam victory, but Team Liquid can! Join Nitr0, Elige, and NAF as they reflect on their journey to winning the Intel Grand Slam. They delve into the process behind winning each of the three required tournaments and share behind-the-scenes insights from their incredible run. This is a must-watch for any fan!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: It's TierList Time! Team Liquid’s Apex Legends squad ranks the new ESports bundles and reacts to their iconic tournament plays. Do you agree with their rankings? How would you change them?

programme.title: The Rise of Ibiza
programme.desc: In this episode, a secret Radiant player tries to blend in with non-Radiants—will our judges spot them based on appearance alone? Then, we dive into Ibiza’s inspiring journey from humble beginnings to becoming a top PUBG player. Don’t miss the surprises!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Everyone loves fast food! Watch CadiaN and Skullz create a tier list of American classics like McDonald's and Burger King. Then, catch our new Counter-Strike roster’s first match and go behind the scenes to see the emotions of assembling the team. Don’t miss this episode—let’s go Team Liquid!

programme.title: Elyola & Apa's World Record Jungle Clear Attempt
programme.desc: APA and Elyola compete to break the jungle clear world record in League of Legends, with the winner tweeting from the loser's account. Then, they showcase top ADC plays from playoffs, including a possible Penta Kill.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Kick off the LCS Summer split with the Team Liquid x Bud Light Tailgate! Join Academy Coach Spawn, IzPanduhh, and DanielKennedyDK as they preview League of Legends teams and make their predictions. Do you agree? Tune in to see!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Hot Juans: hopefully I am not fired
programme.desc: We love hot wings too much! Welcome back to Hot Juans, where we don't mind the inspiration. Today, join our CEO Liquid112 and Hungrybox as they brave spicy wings. Get an inside look at what it’s like to run a major eSports organization like Team Liquid, and see how our CEO handles the heat—literally and figuratively!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: The Ultimate World of Warcraft Boss Guide Part. 3
programme.desc: The World of Warcraft landscape keeps growing with the launch of Aberrus the Shadowed Crucible. Team Liquid's new mythic guides cover Sarkareth and Neltharion, offering top tactics to tackle these bosses. Tune in for all the best tips and tricks!

programme.title: From Smite Loser To League World Champion
programme.desc: Pyosik’s journey shows that even in tough moments, victory is possible! Today’s episode revisits his Worlds win despite missed smites, showcasing his dedication. Then, Razah joins to predict this year’s Six Invitational winner—don’t miss the insights!

programme.title: Coaching Noobs!
programme.desc: Today, watch as Bwipo attempts to coach a League newbie, transforming them into a capable player—can he handle the challenge? Then, see if three pro League players can take down an entire team of Gold players. Tune in to find out who prevails!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Team Liquid CounterStrike faces off in the latest major in Stockholm! See what goes into competing at this level, from behind-the-scenes prep to celebrating the small victories. Tune in to watch their journey and performance in the tournament!

programme.title: Team Liquid Dominates FPS
programme.desc: Razah shares his predictions for the Six Invitational, picking top Rainbow Six Siege teams he thinks can win it all. Do you agree? Then, Team Liquid's Counter-Strike team competes in IEM Dallas 2023, marking the final CS:GO tournament.

programme.title: Mr Beast Is a League Fan?!
programme.desc: In today’s episode, our League team heads to Korea and meets Mr. Beast, an unexpected League fan! Then, Yinsu joins our squad to rank top Valorant teams in an intense tier list. Watch to see who ranks highest and don’t miss the squad vibes!

programme.title: Never Let Jensen Play Orianna
programme.desc: In today’s episode, we explore why Jensen should avoid playing Orianna, revealing the pitfalls he encounters. Then, join Pyosik and Team Liquid as they react to the Worlds Day 2 Swiss Draw. Tune in for insights and reactions you won’t want to miss!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Back with another *2 People Talking*, Disguised Toast is joined by his old friend Hafu! They reminisce about their Among Us lobbies and wild strategies, and delve into the mystery of Hafu's first date, which remains a fun enigma for her and her husband, Dogdog.

programme.title: Teaching Dad To Play Rainbow Six Siege
programme.desc: Video games are a powerful escape and form a unique bond for many. Today, we’re bridging that connection by having our Rainbow Six Siege team teach their dads to play R6 for the first time—bringing family closer through gaming!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Which LoL pro has the most rizz?
programme.desc: Which Team Liquid League of Legends pro has the most rizz? Watch as girls rank our pros' charm and see how they handle the pressure of real-life interactions. Then, join us for LCS Spring Playoffs Week 2 for behind-the-scenes footage and the fun side of being a pro gamer.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Hot takes and World Record attempts
programme.desc: Team Liquid Counter-Strike isn’t all serious! First, join NAF and Twistzz as they discuss and debate CS2 hot takes—see if you agree with their opinions. Then, watch Team Liquid attempt to break Shroud’s 47-kill CS2 World Record. Finally, enjoy Cadian, Skullz, and Yekindar ranking American fast food in a fun tier list.

programme.title: Ultimate Dota 2 Warding Guide
programme.desc: Warding is essential for Dota 2 success! In this episode, we present a detailed guide on using early, mid, and late-game wards effectively. Learn how to maximize map vision and secure more victories in your games!

programme.title: Hot Juans: Paladin Amber
programme.desc: These are our hottest wings yet—and they’re vegan! Welcome to *Hot Juans*, where inspiration is embraced. Join top streamer PaladinAmber as she braves the fiery vegan wings. Can she take the heat, both figuratively and literally? Watch to find out!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Type Racing just got intense! Watch Broxah, Alixxa, Max, and Rogue compete in the World’s Fastest Typing Test, racing at 100mph where a wrong key means a crash! Plus, switch over to Team Liquid Origins to explore the rise of legendary Smash Bros. player Hungrybox.

programme.title: The Worst Trip To Texas Ever
programme.desc: Matumbaman’s Texas trip was a nightmare—travel issues, unexpected hurdles, and more! Watch to believe the chaos he endured. Then, join the team as they react to some of the wildest outplays from Worlds and Champs Queue. Don’t miss the highs and lows of this episode!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Apa's vow of silence pays off!
programme.desc: Apa’s vow of silence might make a difference in the playoffs! Follow Team Liquid League of Legends through the LCS Spring Playoffs, witnessing their preparation and mental strategies for the tournament. Then, see if a Faker can blend in among 5 Challenger-ranked players and avoid detection by the pros.

programme.title: The Only Time NA Succeeded
programme.desc: North America rarely shines in international League of Legends, but there was one moment they held their own! Relive this rare success, then check out “The Chosen,” our trailer for the epic Six Invitational, one of Rainbow Six Siege’s biggest tournaments.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: We're back with the LCS Summer Split Tailgate featuring Academy Coach Spawn! Join us as Coach Spawn dives into this year's team strengths and areas for improvement. Don’t miss his expert insights and analysis on how teams are shaping up!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Change with the meta or fall to the wayside
programme.desc: "Prepare for the evolving World of Warcraft meta! In today’s episode, explore Dragonflight’s new Evoker class, see how new pets might impact the game, and get a behind-the-scenes look at upcoming huge damage buffs. Don’t miss out!"

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Counter-Strike Roster Updates! Check out the formation of our new CS2 roster as the team meets for their first LAN retreat. Watch Cadian, Twistzz, and Skullz settle into their roles, and join us in bidding farewell to oSee.

programme.title: Fresh on the LCS Scene
programme.desc: The LCS is tough, with seasoned teams dominating. Join us as we relive our very first LCS game, showcasing our early days and how we competed with top teams. Watch to see just how far we've come from our humble beginnings!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: We’ll always cherish Zai! This episode revisits his standout TI performances and offers a behind-the-scenes look at our Dota team's preparation. See their highs and lows, focus strategies, and the intense scrimmages leading up to TI.

programme.title: Fraudulent Superteam & Rizz Challenge
programme.desc: Team Liquid’s League of Legends team brings serious skill and fun! They start by reviewing past games to learn how they could have secured wins. Then, they compete IRL to see who has the best "rizz" among the pros, testing their game both on and off the keyboard!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Best of the Best: Worlds Edition
programme.desc: The best watch the best! Join Bjergsen and Bwipo as they react to the craziest Worlds and Champs Queue outplays, analyzing top players' insane moves and strategies. Then, we bid farewell to Bjergsen as he leaves Team Liquid LoL, wishing him all the best in his future career.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: World of Warcraft vs. 5 Meter Keyboard
programme.desc: "The 5-meter keyboard returns! Watch our World of Warcraft guild tackle WOW on the world’s largest keyboard and mouse. Then, join them as they analyze the ultimate PVP vs. PVE showdown. Will size or strategy win out?"

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: We’re back with *Two People Talking*! Disguised Toast is joined by Chef Triciaisabirdy, known for her cooking shows and tutorials on Twitch. Watch as they discuss cooking techniques, share Twitch funny moments, and even give her mom a call!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Hot Juans: PaladinAmber destroys some vegan wings
programme.desc: This is literally the hottest set of wings we’ve made yet—and they’re vegan! Welcome to Hot Juans, where we don’t mind the inspiration. Join us with top streamer PaladinAmber as she faces these scorching vegan wings. Will she handle the heat, both figuratively and literally? Tune in to find out!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Welcome back to Time Lapse! Join Qojqva and Taiga as they revisit one of Taiga’s biggest oversights. Then, watch the team tackle a full Dota 2 game on a massive 5-meter-long keyboard. Don’t miss these epic moments!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Welcome back to Timelapse! This episode explores the origins of Polish superstar Nisha, featuring old clips that highlight his standout moments and why we recruited him. Also, revisit some of Team Liquid's top games against Nisha before he joined us full-time.

programme.title: 3 Pros Vs. 5 Golds
programme.desc: Today’s episode kicks off with FalleN’s legendary Counter-Strike wallbang shots, showcasing his peak skills and the unforgettable crowd reactions. Then, watch as three League of Legends pros attempt to take down a full team of gold players. Will they dominate?

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Welcome to a fun episode! Get to know our players as ShowMaker and Yeon discuss the best LCS players, Elyoya and APA attempt to break the Jungle Clear world record, and the team reacts to the Day 2 tournament draw. Don't miss it!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Best of the best moments: CS Edition
programme.desc: Remember FalleN’s legendary wallbang on Cobblestone? Watch Team Liquid Counter-Strike revisit iconic shots and see which ones stand out. Then, stick around for a Counter-Strike Challenge where Team Liquid players compete to prove who has the best in-game movement skills.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Join Team Liquid in Lima, Peru! Follow their Dota 2 roster as they prepare for and compete in the latest major. Get a behind-the-scenes look at their journey and preparations, then watch them battle for victory in the tournament!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Watch Team Liquid players analyze their old match against Cloud9. Gain insights into their strategies, learn from their reflections, and see their thought process during intense moments.

programme.title: Zai's Last TI Vlog
programme.desc: This may be Zai's last TI, so join us for *Zai's Last TI Vlog*. Go behind the scenes at this monumental tournament and see what players experience both on and off the keyboard to stay focused on victory. Don’t miss this unforgettable journey!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Welcome to the World of Warcraft Arena World Championships! Watch Team Liquid's guild compete for victory as our casters break down key strategies and moments. Don’t miss this thrilling episode as they aim for the top!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: MSI Split drawing 2024: We have to play them?!
programme.desc: Watch as Team Liquid League of Legends reacts to the 2024 MSI Draw, revealing their opponents and the impact on their tournament run. Then, relive their incredible journey to becoming LCS Spring Split Champions with behind-the-scenes footage of their final game preparations and triumphant finish.

programme.title: Peel: The Peru Project
programme.desc: Wes Brown and TJ Barrack take their film crew to the rugged deserts and jungles in Peru with some of the world's best surfers.

programme.title: Quivers
programme.desc: What do you get when you combine MTV’s Cribs and Professional Surfers? Quivers, an in-depth look at the boards of today's top surfers. Featuring Dane Gudauskas, Mikey February, Mikey Wright

programme.title: Quivers
programme.desc: What do you get when you combine MTV’s Cribs and Professional Surfers? Quivers, an in-depth look at the boards of today's top surfers. Featuring Craig Anderson, Mason Ho, Sterling Spencer

programme.title: Quivers

programme.desc: What do you get when you combine MTV’s Cribs and Professional Surfers? Quivers, an in-depth look at the boards of today's top surfers. Featuring Mason Ho, Oliver Kurtz, Noa Deane, Creed McTaggart

programme.title: Quivers

programme.title: Quivers
programme.desc: What do you get when you combine MTV’s Cribs and Professional Surfers? Quivers, an in-depth look at the boards of today's top surfers. Featuring Mikey February, Torren Martyn, Noa Deane, Mason Ho

programme.title: Quivers
programme.desc: What do you get when you combine MTV’s Cribs and Professional Surfers? Quivers, an in-depth look at the boards of today's top surfers. Featuring Dane Gudauskas, Sterling Spencer, Tanner Gudauskas

programme.title: Quivers
programme.desc: What do you get when you combine MTV’s Cribs and Professional Surfers? Quivers, an in-depth look at the boards of today's top surfers. Featuring Tanner Gudauskas, Chippa Wilson, Oliver Kurtz

programme.title: Dirty Old Wedge
programme.desc: Dirty Old Wedge is the real life story of the world's most infamous shorebreak and those who live it

programme.title: Tokyo Rising
programme.desc: John John Florence puts his career on the line against Kelly Slater to qualify for surfings debut in the 2020 Olympics.

programme.title: View from a Blue Moon
programme.desc: See the sport of surfing as its never been captured before in John Florence and Blake Vincent Kuenys second signature release, this time in association with the award-winning film studio, Brain Farm.

programme.title: Fish: The Surfboard Documentary
programme.desc: Fish: the Surfboard Documentary, covers the impact the fish surfboard made on surf culture. A deep look at the origin and impact of the Fish Surfboard design and how it would influence surf culture 30 years later. - A look at what happens when a creative San Diego surfer invents a board with a brand-new shape, and the whole surfing world hops aboard for the ride. THE FISH SURFBOARD DESIGN was created by Steve Lis in the San Diego Cliffs area in 1967, and became HUGELY popular in the 1990's.

programme.title: SingleFin: Yellow
programme.desc: Singlefin Yellow tells the story of one surfboards life as it travels the globe shared by a group of friends.

programme.title: The Endless Summer
programme.desc: The crown jewel to ten years of Bruce Brown surfing documentaries. Brown follows two young surfers around the world in search of the perfect wave, and ends up finding quite a few in addition to some colorful local characters.

programme.title: A Life of Endless Summers: The Bruce Brown Story
programme.desc: The Bruce Brown Story is an exclusive retrospective documentary on Bruce Brown's life told by one who knew him best, his son, Dana Brown. It's a story of a man, a father, a husband, a filmmaker, a pioneer, a legend -A Life Well Lived.

programme.title: The Endless Summer Revisted
programme.desc: A documentary mostly edited together from unused footage from The Endless Summer and The Endless Summer II, this documentary gives further insight into the making and success of the original classic surf documentary. It is written, produced and directed by Dana Brown, son of the director of the first two films, Bruce Brown (who executive produced this film).

programme.title: To Be Frank
programme.desc: To Be Frank explores authenticity and community in surfing via Frank Paine, a 73-year-old South Bay icon.

programme.title: Isolated
programme.desc: Five world class surfers travel to New Guinea in search of undiscovered waves, but end up discovering so much more.

programme.title: Heavy Water
programme.desc: Heavy Water is a Michael Oblowitz film, produced by Red Bull Media House and All Edge Entertainment, that follows the life and times of Nathan Fletcher, part of the royal family of surfing and a key figure in big wave history.

programme.title: Noah: The Art of Surfing
programme.desc: Professional surfer Noah Beschen travels to Western Australia and Tahiti alongside filmmaker Andy Woodward to surf beautiful yet powerful waves before returning home to the North Shore of Oahu.

programme.title: Step into Liquid
programme.desc: Zigzagging from the waters off Ireland to Oahu's ripping North Shore, this documentary profiles the diverse and fascinating characters who have devoted their lives to catching the perfect wave.

programme.title: PAIGE
programme.desc: A closer look into the life of Paige Alms, one of the best big wave surfers in the world, as she trains mentally and physically for the 2017 Pe'ahi Challenge (Jaws) on Maui, conquering 40-50 foot waves, and inspiring the next generation.

programme.title: Archy: Built for Speed, Born to Ride
programme.desc: Archys story is one of survival through surf stardom at an early age, fame, drugs, alcohol, sponsorships and the surf rock star lifestyle. Compelling interviews, and explosive surf action from the 80s, 90s, 2000s and beyond.

programme.title: Fabric to Fashion
programme.desc: Fabric to Fashion is a reality show featuring designers and sewist from all over the world. Designers are given a challenge, then we follow the guests designing in their own sewing spaces. Angela Wolf mentors and guides the designers throughout each challenge, and often throws in a few extra twists!

programme.title: Fabric to Fashion Episode 2
programme.desc: Fabric to Fashion is a reality show featuring designers and sewist from all over the world. Designers are given a challenge, then we follow the guests designing in their own sewing spaces. Angela Wolf mentors and guides the designers throughout each challenge, and often throws in a few extra twists!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Birth Of A Guitar Part 1
programme.desc: "This is a Wood Whisperer first: a series featuring an aspiring luthier, Rick Urschel. Rick takes us through the process of building a classic guitar from a kit available at LMII.com. This is Rick’s first attempt at a guitar, and as such, I am not presenting this as a “how-to”. Instead, this is just one man’s experience as he works his butt off making a beautiful guitar for his wife. I think you are really going to enjoy it. A special thanks to Rick for allowing me to “Whisperize” his content!"

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Birth Of A Guitar Part 2
programme.desc: Rick continues on his journey into the world of guitar-building. He takes us through adding kerfing, inlaying the tail wedge, installation of the binding, and construction of the back, the soundboard, the fretboard, and the bridge. We’ll also see how Rick handles a few errors he made along the way. One error is so big, the fate of the entire project hangs in the balance!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Birth Of A Guitar Part 3
programme.desc: The exciting conclusion to Rick’s adventure into the world of lutherie. Rick does an incredible job recovering from his previous, nearly disastrous mistake. He takes us through the final assembly as well as his finishing process, which involves a number of techniques including pore-filling, French polish, and wiping varnish. Congratulations to Rick and a huge thank you for letting me tear up your video footage. I know more than a few folks have been inspired to dive into the wonderful world of instrument-making.

programme.title: The Knit Show: The Global
programme.desc: On this episode of The Knit Show with Vickie Howell we celebrate our global community by focusing on yarns, techniques, and designers from around the world.

programme.title: The Knit Show: The Yarn Trends
programme.desc: On The Trends Episode (#101) of The Knit Show with Vickie Howell we focused on the state of the art of knitting, today. We covered yarn trends, popular items to make, modern applications of techniques, new products, and more!

programme.title: The Knit Show: The Vintage Touches
programme.desc: Old school style rules this episode as we focus on the stitcherly details, like crocheted edgings and antique buttons, that give a project a vintage touch.

programme.title: The Great Alligator
programme.desc: Tourists on a tropical island anger an island god, who turns himself into a giant alligator and stalks them.

programme.desc: A grizzled ex-sheriff helps a man framed for murder to confront the powerful trio of brothers who want him dead.

programme.title: Triple Cross
programme.desc: During WW2, convicted bank robber Eddie Chapman becomes a triple agent working for both the British and the Germans.

programme.title: Master With Cracked Fingers
programme.desc: Young Jackie was intrigued by Kung Fu since an early age, but his father strictly forbade its' practice. One day he met an old beggar who offered to teach him to fight. As he grew up, he got better and better, until he was forced to use his new skills against an extortion ring that was threatening his uncle's restaurant.

programme.desc: A man who loves to travel, travels to an island where a mad doctor is creating zombies.

programme.title: 2025 Lexus Championship Series
programme.desc: WLL: Boston Guard vs California Palms from February 12, 2025

programme.title: Through X
programme.desc: Paul Carcaterra heads to Evanston, IL to visit with Northwestern's Izzy Scane. Izzy has been a dominant force for the Wildcats since she first arrived on campus. With a National title, the Tewaaraton Award winner, and record shattering season – she has cemented herself as an all-time great. We also went to Charlottesville, VA to dissect the elite game of Connor Shellenberger: a hometown hero, and arguably the best player in history for the University of Virginia.

programme.title: WLL Announcement Press Conference
programme.desc: Join Paul Rabil, Charlotte North, Izzy Scane, Alex Aust Holman, and Lizzie Colson as they take over Times Square to announce the brand new Women's Lacrosse League.

programme.title: 2025 Lexus Championship Series
programme.desc: WLL: Maryland Charm vs Boston Guard from February 13, 2025

programme.title: Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show
programme.desc: This might be the biggest episode of the Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse show yet! We've got sit downs with some of lacrosse's best, including: college lacrosse review with @diggstape, WLL recap with @officiallaxgirl, and exclusive interviews with Madison Doucette + Emily Hawryschuk + Marcus & Brian Holman after winning the 2025 Championship Series.

programme.desc: WLL: Maryland Charm vs New York Charging from February 11, 2025

We also went to Charlottesville, VA to dissect the elite game of Connor Shellenberger: a hometown hero, and arguably the best player in history for the University of Virginia.

programme.title: WLL Announcement Press Conference
programme.desc: Join Paul Rabil, Charlotte North, Izzy Scane, Alex Aust Holman, and Lizzie Colson as they take over Times Square to announce the brand new Women's Lacrosse League.

programme.title: Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show
programme.desc: In this episode, we break down the latest in college lacrosse, starting with UVA’s rough stretch and what it means for their season. We dive into key matchups, including UNC vs. Hopkins, and discuss which teams are legit contenders or just riding the hype. Plus, Ivy League insights, scheduling frustrations, and a heated debate on traditions in "Start/Bench/Cut."

programme.desc: The ghost team is confronted by rival ghost hunters before they are called to a home in broad daylight to deal with some possessed items.

programme.title: Ghost Show
programme.desc: In a miscommunication the ghost team is called in to assist with some ghosts that might be fresher than they are used to.

programme.title: Burb Patrol
programme.desc: Veteran security guard Randall Harrison and his less than enthusiastic partner Alex, attempt to bring peace and quiet to the neighborhood after responding to a string of noise complaints against a popular social media influencer who refuses to follow the rules.

programme.title: Burb Patrol
programme.desc: Randall and Alex have to clean up the streets....literally. When one of the residents in the neighborhood is not properly cleaning up after their dog, its up to Randall and Alex to figure out who the crap culprit is and nab them before its too late.

programme.title: Burb Patrol
programme.desc: Randall and Alex discuss their preferred pistachio preference. They meet a foreign invader with a surprising connection to Alex. The guys then rescue an injured jogger while an out-of-control chiropractor keeps getting in the way.

programme.title: Burb Patrol
programme.desc: The guys protect the neighborhood from a foreign invader and rescue an injured jogger from an out of control chiropractor.

programme.title: Burb Patrol
programme.desc: Randall and Alex confront a resident about Christmas decorations in July and a man running an overly sexual yoga class in the park. When Dankbank gets into an argument with a neighborhood Karen on the loose, Randall and Alex are forced to play mediator.

programme.title: Burb Patrol
programme.desc: Randall and Alex debate over the best Batman actor while attempting to solve a problem from a resident they can't understand. While looking for clues, Alex has another run- in with the neighborhood social justice warriors who again challenge his level of 'wokeness'.

programme.title: Burb Patrol
programme.desc: Randall and Alex break up an altercation between two suburban women ready to fight it out. Randall is forced to confront and shut down Dankbank's out of control party alone after Alex is called away by HR, but it gives Alex the chance to finally get some alone time with his crush.
